overview: Phoebe's uterus is examined for implantation of the embryos. Meanwhile, a seemingly harmless game between Chandler and Joey against Monica and Rachel escalates into a full blown contest where the stakes are raised higher and higher.

name: The One with Rachel's Crush
overview: After seeing Kathy's play, Chandler becomes convinced she is cheating on him. Rachel develops a crush on one of her customers. Monica becomes jealous when she realizes she is no longer the 'hostess'.

name: The One with Joey's Dirty Day
overview: After a three-day fishing trip with his dad, Joey doesn't have time to take a shower before going to the set of a new movie.  Rachel sets Ross up with her boss's niece. Chandler is despondent after his breakup with Kathy.

name: The One with All the Rugby
overview: Ross attempts to learn how to play rugby to impress Emily. Monica obsesses over an electric lighting switch. Chandler runs into Janice and creates an elaborate plan to get away from her.

name: The One with the Fake Party
overview: Rachel throws a fake good bye party for Emily, just so that she can see Joshua outside of work. A pregnant Phoebe craves meat.

name: The One with the Free Porn
overview: Chandler and Joey discover that they're getting a free channel on their TV. Monica convinces Ross to tell Emily how he really feels before she leaves. At an OB/GYN appointment, Phoebe gets surprising news.

name: The One with Rachel's New Dress
overview: Rachel has an awkward encounter with Joshua's parents. Phoebe is offered the chance to name one of the triplets. Ross becomes paranoid when Emily goes to London with Susan.

name: The One with All the Haste
overview: Monica and Rachel try to win their apartment back from Chandler and Joey. Ross takes the next step in his relationship with Emily.

name: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
overview: Monica tries on Emily's wedding dress. Rachel is jealous of Ross's proposal to Emily. Chandler takes Joey to a sleep clinic when he starts snoring.

name: The One with the Invitation
overview: Ross and Emily discuss who to invite to their wedding. Ross and Rachel each reminisce about their up-and-down relationship.

name: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
overview: Phoebe is tired of being pregnant and is experiencing major mood swings. Ross chooses Joey as his best man. After a mishap at his bachelor party, he rethinks his decision.

name: The One with Ross's Wedding (1)
overview: Phoebe tries to help Rachel deal with her feelings for Ross as the rest of the gang head to London. Someone else unexpectedly shows up to the wedding.

name: The One with Ross's Wedding (2)
overview: Phoebe calls to warn of Rachel's impending arrival. Ross and Emily's parents get into an argument. The wedding ends with a blunder.

name: The One After Ross Says Rachel
overview: In the aftermath of the wedding, Ross tries to rescue his marriage with Emily.  Meanwhile, Chandler and Monica try to spend time alone together.

name: The One with All the Kissing
overview: Ross continues to try and mend his marriage to Emily.  Chandler tries to hide his relationship with Monica.  Meanwhile, Phoebe starts getting irritated by everyone's London stories.

name: The One Hundredth
overview: Phoebe is rushed to the hospital to give birth. Joey winds up with kidney stones. Meanwhile, Rachel tries to set Monica up on a date with a male nurse.

name: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
overview: Joey lands a job with a PBS telethon. Monica tries to convince Rachel that she's dating someone from work to hide her relationship with Chandler.

name: The One with the Kips
overview: Chandler and Monica go away for the weekend but spend the entire time fighting. Ross tries to tell Rachel about his agreement with Emily.

name: The One with the Yeti
overview: The gang become frustrated with Emily's demands to Ross. Monica and Rachel mistake their new neighbor for a yeti. Phoebe receives a fur coat as a family heirloom from her mother.

name: The One Where Ross Moves In
overview: Chandler and Joey let Ross move in with them.  Meanwhile, Phoebe gets involved with the local health inspector and Rachel plays hard-to-get with Danny.

name: The One with All the Thanksgivings
overview: The group reminisces about their worst Thanksgivings.

name: The One with Ross's Sandwich
overview: Joey starts to get uncomfortable with protecting Monica and Chandler's secret. Meanwhile, Ross becomes enraged at work when someone steals his sandwich.

name: The One with the Inappropriate Sister
overview: Joey teaches Ross how to be unemployed. Phoebe is working for the Salvation Army during the holidays. Rachel meets Danny's sister and is dismayed when the two seem a little too playful.

name: The One with All the Resolutions
overview: With the New Year, the friends make resolutions. Rachel discovers a big secret that threatens to spoil her resolution.

name: The One with Chandler's Work Laugh
overview: Monica learns that Chandler has a second, more annoying personality when he's around his boss. Ross learns that Emily is getting remarried.

name: The One with Joey's Bag
overview: Monica gives Chandler a painful massage. Phoebe's grandmother dies and she is shocked at who comes to the funeral. Rachel gives Joey a "shoulder bag" for an audition.

name: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
overview: When the friends discover that Ugly Naked Guy is moving out of his apartment, Ross leaps at the opportunity to get his own place. Phoebe finds out about Monica and Chandler and tries to get them to reveal the truth.

name: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey
overview: Joey starts dating a girl who likes to playfully punch him. Ross makes enemies with is new neighbors.

name: The One with the Cop
overview: Joey has a dream about Monica. Phoebe finds a police badge under her seat at Central Perk. Ross buys a sofa but has trouble moving it up the stairs into his new apartment.

name: The One with Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
overview: Rachel has an awkward encounter when she interviews for a new job. Monica becomes jealous of Phoebe and Gary. Joey searches for a 'hot girl' in Ross's building.

name: The One Where Rachel Smokes
overview: Rachel decides to start smoking in order to avoid missing important meetings with her boss. Joey auditions for a soup commercial with Ross's son Ben. Monica and Phoebe plan a surprise birthday party for Rachel.

name: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
overview: Joey's grandmother comes over to watch his network debut. Meanwhile, Ross tries unsuccessfully to flirt with the pizza delivery girl.

name: The One with the Ride Along
overview: As the date for Emily's remarriage draws closer, the group tries to keep Ross distracted.  As a result, Ross and the other guys get invited to take a ride along with Gary.

name: The One with the Ball
overview: Gary asks Phoebe to move in with him. Overcome with boredom, Ross and Joey start throwing a ball to each other. Rachel buys an expensive cat.

name: The One with Joey's Big Break
overview: Joey gets offered a lead part in a movie shooting outside of Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Rachel gets an eye infection and Phoebe is mad at Ross.

name: The One in Vegas (1)
overview: The gang go to Las Vegas to visit Joey. Chandler is angry when he finds out Monica had lunch with Richard. Ross and Rachel try to embarrass each other after an awkward encounter.

name: The One in Vegas (2)
overview: Chandler and Monica reconcile and hastily decide to get married. Ross and Rachel get drunk and roam the casino. Phoebe deals with a 'lurker' on the slot machines.

name: The One After Vegas
overview: Ross and Rachel deal with the aftermath of their drunken night. Phoebe and Joey head back to New York in the taxi cab.

name: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel
overview: Monica and Chandler decide to move in together. Ross tries to keep Rachel from learning that he hasn't kept his promise.

name: The One with Ross' Denial
overview: Monica and Chandler disagree over how to redecorate Rachel's old room. Joey advertises for a new roommate. Ross is unwilling to accept that he still has feelings for Rachel.

name: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance
overview: Ross is asked to give a lecture at NYU.  Joey's SAG health insurance has lapsed due to his lack of work.

name: The One with Joey's Porsche
overview: Joey tries to find the owner of a Porsche who left their keys in Central Perk. Monica and Chandler agree to baby-sit the triplets for Phoebe. Meanwhile, Ross and Rachel try to get an annulment.

name: The One on the Last Night
overview: On the last night before Chandler and Monica move in together, Monica and Rachel argue, and Chandler tries to give Joey money to help him pay the bills.

name: The One Where Phoebe Runs
overview: Rachel and Phoebe decide to start running together. Joey finds a new roommate. Chandler decides to surprise Monica by cleaning the apartment, but forgets where everything goes.

name: The One with Ross's Teeth
overview: Ross bleaches his teeth for a date. Chandler convinces Joey that Janine is trying to take over his apartment. Rachel uses gossip to impress her boss.

name: The One Where Ross Got High
overview: Ross and Monica's parents come for Thanksgiving. Rachel tries to make a dessert. Joey and Ross can't wait for dinner to end so they can go to Janine's party.

name: The One with the Routine
overview: Janine gets an invitation to dance on "Dick Clark's New Year's Rockin' Eve" and invites Joey, Monica and Ross to join her. Rachel, Phoebe and Chandler search for their Christmas presents.

name: The One with the Apothecary Table
overview: Rachel orders an apothecary table from a store that Phoebe hates. Janine and Joey double date with Chandler and Monica.

name: The One with the Joke
overview: Chandler and Ross fight over ownership of a joke and Joey starts working at Central Perk.

name: The One with Rachel's Sister
overview: A sick Monica desperately tries to convince Chandler that she's not sick. Rachel's sister Jill comes to town.

name: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry
overview: Chandler admits that he hasn't cried since he was a child. Phoebe discovers that Ursula is starring in porno movies using her name. Rachel desperately tries to stop Ross and Jill from starting a relationship.

name: The One That Could Have Been (1)
overview: Barry and Mindy's impending divorce prompts the gang to fantasize about what their lives might be like if they'd all taken different courses.

name: The One That Could Have Been (2)
overview: The gang continue to think about how different their lives could have been.

name: The One with Unagi
overview: Joey needs money for new headshots, and tries to enter a medical study. Rachel and Phoebe are taking a self-defense class. Chandler needs a homemade present for Monica's Valentine's Day present.

name: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
overview: Ross considers dating a student. An ex-girlfriend of Chandler's is directing new movie and Joey wants an audition.  A fire starts in Phoebe and Rachel's apartment.

name: The One with Joey's Fridge
overview: Phoebe, Monica and Chandler compete to get Rachel a date. Joey's fridge is broken and he tries to trick everyone into buying him a new one. Elizabeth tells Ross her plans to visit Daytona Beach for spring break.

name: The One with Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
overview: Joey gets an audition for the lead character in a new TV show. When the audition is rescheduled, Chandler takes the message and forgets to tell Joey.

name: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
overview: Ross meets Elizabeth's dad for the first time. Phoebe decides to write a book about Monica and Chandler. Joey may be fired from his sitcom when he has a fight with C.H.E.E.S.E.'s operator.

name: The One Where Paul's the Man
overview: While visiting an art museum, Monica puts her name on a two-year wait list to use it as a wedding venue. Paul threatens to get Ross fired if he doesn't stop seeing his daughter.

name: The One with the Ring
overview: Chandler and Phoebe shop for a ring for Monica. Rachel wants Paul to open up to her.

name: The One with the Proposal (1)
overview: Chandler plans to propose to Monica, but his plans go awry. Phoebe and Joey join Rachel at a charity auction.

name: The One with the Proposal (2)
overview: Chandler continues to pretend to hate the idea of marriage, unaware Richard wants Monica back. Meanwhile, Rachel and Phoebe discuss their 'back-up' plans.

name: The One with Monica's Thunder
overview: Everyone celebrates Monica and Chandler's engagement. Ross and Rachel upstage them by briefly reuniting. Joey prepares for an audition where he must play a 19-year-old.

name: The One with Rachel's Book
overview: Phoebe temporarily moves in with Ross, bringing her massage parlor with her. Joey discovers that Rachel has been reading a trashy romance novel. Monica finds out her parents spent her wedding money.

name: The One with Phoebe's Cookies
overview: Rachel teaches Joey how to sail his boat. Chandler attempts to bond with Monica's father. Monica tries desperately to reproduce Phoebe's grandmother's secret cookie recipe.

name: The One with Rachel's Assistant
overview: Rachel is tasked with hiring herself an assistant. Monica, Chandler and Ross engage in a war of secret sharing after Monica and Chandler vow to be more honest.

name: The One with the Engagement Picture
overview: While taking engagement photos, Chandler struggles to photograph well. Rachel enlists Joey to take Tag out for a night on the town. Phoebe and Ross date a couple in the middle of a divorce.

name: The One with the Nap Partners
overview: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid-of-honor. Joey and Ross find themselves in awkward positions after a nap.

name: The One with Ross's Library Book
overview: Rachel and Phoebe convince Joey to keep dating a girl that they like. Monica unintentionally invites Janice to the wedding. Ross is proud to find his book in the library, but gets upset about its location.

name: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs
overview: Ross drives himself insane when he can't name all 50 states in a simple game. Tag joins the gang for Thanksgiving dinner. Phoebe sneaks a dog into the apartment, making Chandler extremely nervous.

name: The One with All the Candy
overview: Ross buys Phoebe a bike. Rachel and Tag try to hide their relationship at work. Meanwhile, Monica decides to make candy and leave it outside her door as a way to meet the neighbors.

name: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
overview: Ross tries to teach Ben about Hanukkah. Phoebe prepares to move back into her refurbished apartment and tries to convince Rachel to move back in with her.

name: The One with All the Cheesecakes
overview: Phoebe gets angry with Joey when he blows off dinner with her for a date. Chandler mistakenly gets a cheesecake delivered to his apartment.

name: The One Where They're Up All Night
overview: Ross assembles the gang on the roof to watch a passing comet.

name: The One Where Rosita Dies
overview: Phoebe takes a job as a telemarketer for an office supply company.  Monica and Ross discover that their parents are selling their house. Rachel accidently breaks Joey's favorite chair.

name: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
overview: When Rachel turns 30, the gang reminisces about their own 30th birthdays.

name: The One with Joey's New Brain
overview: Ross plans a surprise for Monica and Chandler's wedding. Drake Ramoray is coming out of his coma on Days of Our Lives. Phoebe and Rachel fight over a guy who left his cell phone in Central Perk.

name: The One with the Truth About London
overview: Chandler becomes upset after learning who Monica was actually looking for the first night they were together. Rachel gets in trouble after teaching Ben practical jokes.

name: The One with the Cheap Wedding Dress
overview: Monica regrets telling a woman about a discount bridal shop when they end up fighting over the same dress. Meanwhile, Joey and Ross discover that they're dating the same girl.

name: The One with Joey's Award
overview: Joey is nominated for a Soapy Award. One of Ross's students convinces him that he failed his midterm because he's in love.

name: The One with Ross and Monica's Cousin
overview: Joey auditions for a big movie role. Rachel and Phoebe plan Monica's wedding shower at the last minute. Ross and Monica's cousin visits and Ross becomes attracted to her.

name: The One with Rachel's Big Kiss
overview: Rachel's friend from college shows up at the coffee house which brings back memories of their past. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross argue for possession of Val Kilmer's tuxedo.

name: The One with the Vows
overview: Chandler and Monica are faced with writing their wedding vows. They turn to memories of past events to help them.

name: The One with Chandler's Dad
overview: Rachel finds out she is the only one who hasn't driven Monica's Porsche. Meanwhile, Chandler and Monica go off to Vegas to find Chandler's dad.

name: The One with Chandler and Monica's Wedding (1)
overview: As the wedding gets closer, Chandler's becomes overwhelmed. Joey is starring in a movie with a prestigious actor who has a spitting problem.

name: The One With Chandler And Monica's Wedding (2)
overview: Ross desperately searches for the missing Chandler. Joey encounters problems trying to get off the movie set.

name: The One After I Do
overview: Chandler's hopes of not embarrassing Monica on the dance floor are ruined by his new shoes. Ross attempts to flirt with an attractive wedding guest. The friends learn that someone may be pregnant.

name: The One with the Red Sweater
overview: Joey discovers a red sweater and it causes speculation as to who the father of Rachel's baby is. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross search for the disposable cameras left behind at the wedding.

name: The One Where Rachel Tells...
overview: Chandler and Monica leave for their honeymoon. Rachel prepares to break the news to the father of her baby.

name: The One with the Videotape
overview: Ross and Rachel disagree over what happened when they slept together and Ross accidentally reveals that he has the encounter on videotape.

name: The One with Rachel's Date
overview: Phoebe begins dating a guy who works for Monica, while Joey sets Rachel up on a date with one of his co-stars.

name: The One with the Halloween Party
overview: Monica and Chandler decide to throw a costumed Halloween party. Phoebe runs into Ursula and invites her and her fiancé to the party.

name: The One with the Stain
overview: Chandler hires a maid, whom Monica suspects is stealing her clothing. Eric breaks up with Ursula  to be with Phoebe.

name: The One with the Stripper
overview: Rachel prepares to have dinner with her dad and tell him that she's pregnant. Meanwhile, Chandler discovers that Monica had a bachelorette party with a stripper.

name: The One with the Rumor
overview: Monica invites an old friend from high school over for Thanksgiving dinner. Meanwhile, Joey vows to eat an entire turkey by himself.

name: The One with Monica's Boots
overview: Monica splurges on an expensive pair of boots. Phoebe learns that Ben goes to school with Sting's son.

name: The One with Ross's Step Forward
overview: Ross starts to panic when Mona gets an idea to send out a holiday card for the two of them. Chandler's newly divorced boss tries to get Monica and Chandler to come out to dinner with him.

name: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
overview: Phoebe gives Monica and Chandler a late wedding gift. Ross gets the opportunity to teach an important class. Joey takes Rachel to dinner on a pretend date.

name: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
overview: Monica turns Chandler on to the concept of a bath to relax. Ross and Rachel discuss baby names and whether or not to learn the baby's sex.

name: The One with the Secret Closet
overview: Chandler realizes he's never seen what's in the closet by the bathroom and tries to break in.

name: The One with the Birthing Video
overview: Phoebe tries to cheer up Joey by lending him the world's happiest dog. Monica and Chandler's romantic Valentine's Day is interrupted when they watch a birthing video.

name: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
overview: Ross has trouble understanding Joey's revelation. Meanwhile, Phoebe thinks she has met Monica's soulmate.

name: The One with the Tea Leaves
overview: Joey is avoiding Rachel and she tries to draw him into conversation. Phoebe resumes reading tea leaves. Ross tries to retrieve his favorite shirt from Mona's.

name: The One in Massapequa
overview: Everybody prepares for the Gellers' 35th wedding anniversary party.  Monica wants to write the perfect toast. Phoebe invites her new boyfriend, Parker.

name: The One with Joey's Interview
overview: Joey prepares for an interview with Soap Opera Digest. He reminisces about his past acting experiences, his friends, and his romantic life.

name: The One with the Baby Shower
overview: Rachel panics when she realizes that she is not ready to take care of her baby. Meanwhile, the guys help Joey practice for his audition as the host of a wild game show called "Bamboozled."

name: The One with the Cooking Class
overview: Monica's restaurant gets a bad review and decides to join a cooking class with Joey. Ross goes on a date with a clerk from a baby store, making Rachel jealous.

name: The One Where Rachel Is Late
overview: With the release of Joey's movie approaching, he must decide which friend to invite to the premiere. Monica and Phoebe bet on when Rachel's baby will be born.

name: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby (1)
overview: Rachel and Ross arrive at the hospital. Monica and Chandler decide they want to have a baby.

name: The One Where Rachel Has A Baby (2)
overview: After Rachel gives birth to her baby, she must confront relationship issues around her.

name: The One Where No One Proposes
overview: Confusion reigns in the wake of Joey's misguided proposal. Monica and Chandler begin trying to have a baby.

name: The One Where Emma Cries
overview: Chandler  falls asleep during an important work meeting.  Emma won't stop crying after Rachel interrupts her nap.

name: The One with the Pediatrician
overview: Rachel's pediatrician drops her as a client because she calls him incessantly. Joey arranges a blind date for Phoebe.

name: The One with the Sharks
overview: Phoebe realizes she's never had a long term relationship. Monica makes a discovery while visiting Chandler in Tulsa.

name: The One with Phoebe's Birthday Dinner
overview: The friends are getting together to celebrate Phoebe's birthday, but everyone is late to dinner for various reasons.

name: The One with the Male Nanny
overview: Ross mocks Rachel's new male nanny. Monica says that somebody from her job is the funniest guy she's ever met, upsetting Chandler.

name: The One with Ross' Inappropriate Song
overview: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing "Baby Got Back."  Joey and Chandler find a video tape in Richard's old apartment. Phoebe has dinner with Mike and his parents.

name: The One with Rachel's Other Sister
overview: Rachel's sister Amy shows up for Thanksgiving and causes arguments amongst the friends.

name: The One with Rachel's Phone Number
overview: Rachel is ready to start dating again and goes out to a bar with Phoebe.  Joey thinks Monica is cheating on Chandler.

name: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
overview: Chandler is stuck in Tulsa for Christmas with an attractive co-worker, worrying Monica.

name: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
overview: Rachel decides to return to work, Chandler begins looking for a new job, and Phoebe gets a job as an extra on Joey's show.

name: The One with Phoebe's Rats
overview: Gavin gives Rachel a birthday gift and Ross makes  Joey to stay away from Emma's new nanny. Meanwhile, Mike accidentally kills Phoebe's pet rat.

name: The One Where Monica Sings
overview: A night at Mike's piano bar gives Monica a moment in the spotlight. Meanwhile, Chandler employs a secret skill to help Joey.

name: The One with the Blind Dates
overview: Joey and Phoebe conspire to set up Rachel and Ross on the worst blind dates ever. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler babysit Emma.

name: The One with the Mugging
overview: Joey endures a draining audition. Ross and Phoebe discover a secret link after being mugged together on the street. Chandler starts an advertising internship.

name: The One with the Boob Job
overview: When Monica and Chandler are financially strapped, they both secretly ask Joey for a loan. Phoebe asks Mike to move in with her and Rachel tries to make the apartment baby-safe.

name: The One with the Memorial Service
overview: Chandler and Ross joke around on their college website. Joey refuses to give Emma his favorite stuffed animal. Phoebe begs Monica to help her avoid a post-breakup tryst with Mike.

name: The One with the Lottery
overview: The friends purchase lottery tickets in hopes to win a huge jackpot. Meanwhile, Chandler waits for a phone call that could mean a new paying job.

name: The One with Rachel's Dream
overview: Rachel dreams about Joey. Chandler buys a non-refundable weekend getaway for himself and Monica, but when she can't get time off at work, Ross joins him.

name: The One with the Soap Opera Party
overview: Joey doesn't tell the gang about his plans to throw a party on the roof of the building. Ross meets a new colleague and is instantly attracted to her.

name: The One with the Fertility Test
overview: Chandler and Monica secretly go to a fertility clinic and run into someone they know. Ross helps Joey win over Charlie.

name: The One with the Donor
overview: Monica and Chandler begin sorting through potential sperm donors. Phoebe is nervous about going to a party to see Mike, but runs into someone from her past.

name: The One in Barbados (1)
overview: The friends support Ross as he prepares for a keynote paleontological address in Barbados. Phoebe has her hands full with two suitors, David and Mike.

name: The One in Barbados (2)
overview: Rachel finally tells Joey about her crush on him. Monica and Mike compete at a game of ping pong.

name: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
overview: Joey and Ross both attempt to tell each other about their new relationships. Phoebe discovers that Mike has a girlfriend.

name: The One Where Ross Is Fine
overview: Ross invites Joey and Rachel to dinner with him and Charlie. Chandler and Monica visit some friends of Phoebe's to learn about adoption. Frank Jr. visits with the triplets.

name: The One with Ross' Tan
overview: Joey and Rachel struggle to be more than friends. Ross gets a spray tan.

name: The One with the Cake
overview: It's Emma's first birthday and Rachel won't let the party start until Emma wakes from her nap.

name: The One Where Rachel's Sister Babysits
overview: Monica and Chandler ask Joey to write a letter to the adoption agency on their behalf. Rachel's sister Amy visits. Phoebe spoils Mike's plans to propose.

name: The One with Ross's Grant
overview: Rachel and Monica fight over who has to take Phoebe's ugly painting. Ross is up for a paleontology grant, but Charlie's ex-boyfriend is the one who reviews the applications.

name: The One with the Home Study
overview: Phoebe and Mike struggle over their decision to donate their wedding fund to charity. Ross discovers Rachel's irrational fear of swings.  Monica and Chandler prepare for a visit from an adoption worker.

name: The One with the Late Thanksgiving
overview: Joey, Ross, Rachel and Phoebe convince Monica and Chandler to host Thanksgiving, however the four of them arrive late.

name: The One with the Birth Mother
overview: Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet a potential mother for their child. Rachel picks out an outfit for Ross to wear on a date, while Joey's date pick the food off of his plate.

name: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
overview: Phoebe and Rachel think Chandler's having an affair, but it comes to be a big misunderstanding.  The friends reminisce about living in New York together.

name: The One Where the Stripper Cries
overview: Phoebe's bachelorette party features a rather unexpected surprise.  Joey appears on a game show. Old secrets come to light when Ross and Chandler attend a college reunion.

name: The One with Phoebe's Wedding
overview: A winter storm affects Phoebe's wedding. Monica takes control, and chaos ensues.

name: The One Where Joey Speaks French
overview: Phoebe tries to teach Joey to speak French for an audition. Ross and Rachel head out to Long Island after her dad has a heart attack.

name: The One with Princess Consuela
overview: Monica and Chandler bring Joey on a visit to their house. Phoebe learns that she can change her name to whatever she wants. Rachel has an interview, but it doesn't go as planned.

name: The One Where Estelle Dies
overview: Ross tries to get Rachel rehired at Ralph Lauren. Phoebe discovers that Joey's agent Estelle has died, but doesn't want to tell him. Chandler and Monica run into Janice.

name: The One with Rachel's Going Away Party
overview: The friends throw Rachel a small going away party and she proceeds to say goodbye to each of her friends individually.

name: The Last One (1)
overview: Erica gives birth, but there's one small added surprise. Ross realizes that he still loves Rachel.

name: The Last One (2)
overview: Ross and Phoebe chase Rachel to the airport. Meanwhile, Chandler and Monica pack up their apartment. Joey gets Monica and Chandler a surprising gift.

name: Christmas Special (1)
overview: It's been three years since the BBC documentary crew first arrived at the office. Back for one last visit, they find Gareth Keenan now in charge and is running the office with a military precision. Since we last saw David Brent he has become a sales rep for a cleaning products company, released his own pop single and has acquired an agent to look after his celebrity appearances. He visits his old workplace regularly, despite him successfully suing Wernham Hogg for unfair dismissal. The big news for Tim is the imminent arrival of Dawn. The documentary crew has kindly offered to fly Dawn and boyfriend Lee from Florida back to Slough for the office Christmas party.

name: Christmas Special (2)
overview: Tim's world is rocked when Dawn turns up at the office to say hello. Despite a stern warning from Gareth and wise words from Keith in Accounts, Tim can't help but get his hopes up again. Meanwhile, David Brent has been using the services of a dating agency and, in between making celebrity appearances in nightclubs, he meets up for drinks with a rather disappointing selection of single women. The office Christmas party kicks off like any other but there are a few surprises in store...

name: The Office Values: Microsoft Video
overview: The first of two training videos by Ricky Gervais and Steven Merchant for the employees of Microsoft.

name: The Office Values: Realising Potential
overview: The second of two training videos by Ricky Gervais and Steven Merchant for the employees of Microsoft.

name: How I Made The Office
overview: A Documentary showing a behind the scenes look at the creation of this series. Originally aired on BBC America following the Christmas Specials

name: The Office Revisited
overview: To celebrate the ten year anniversary of the last episode of The Office, this special catches up with David Brent, the former manager of Slough paper merchants Wernham Hogg as he tries to kickstart a new career as a talent manager. This short episode aired as part of Red Nose Day 2013.

name: David Brent: Life on the Road
overview: A camera crew catches up with David Brent, the former star of the fictional British TV series The Office, as he now fancies himself a rock star on the road.

name: The Office - Closed for Business Documentary
overview: A short documentary on the making of The Office Christmas Specials.

name: Ricky Gervais' and Stephen Merchant's Video Diary of the Making of Series Two of The Office
overview: Ricky Gervais' and Stephen Merchant's Video Diary of the Making of Series Two of The Office.

name: If You Don't Know Me By Now
overview: Music video for Brent's version of "If You Don't Know Me By Now".

name: Pre-Pilot
overview: The original pre-pilot that Merchant made as part of his BBC producer training back in 1998. David Brent is in charge of a wood-pulp, bleach and dye company, and includes Merchant among the office employees.

name: Who Cares Wins
overview: Full-length spoof training video with Peter Purvis that featured in episode 4

name: The Beginning
overview: Web video on how The Office began

name: The Style
overview: Web video about the style of the show

name: Comedy
overview: Web video about how the comedy of the show and how it reflects people's sense of humour

name: Staff Training
overview: Web video talking about real experiences of staff training

name: Impact
overview: Web video about the impact of the show

name: Downsize
overview: David Brent, manager of the Slough branch of Wernham Hogg paper merchants, is told that it might be closed down. He makes the rash promise of No Redundancies...

name: Work Experience
overview: A new girl arrives on work experience. The day is brightened up even more by a doctored picture of David Brent that's been e-mailed around the office. Cue Gareth Keenan Special Investigator...

name: The Quiz
overview: Tim is 30 today and receives some special gifts. Dawn wants to organize after-work drinks for him but it's also the annual quiz night. Brent & Finchy see it as a point of honour that they win. The only real competition comes from Tim & Ricky...

name: Training
overview: Wernham Hogg, Slough branch are having a training day. Rowan, an outside consultant tries his best.  Dawn has other things on her mind...

name: New Girl
overview: Brent decides to take on a new secretary despite the spectre of redundancies in the Slough branch. He can choose between some bloke that's turned up for interview and a pretty young blonde. The day is rounded off with a trip to Chasers nightclub...

name: Judgement
overview: Jennifer arrives to give the final decision. The Slough branch is to be merged with Swindon and some people will lose their jobs, and Dave has been offered Jennifer's job, which he accepts.

name: Merger
overview: As a result of the Swindon merger, a group of new staff arrive at Slough branch and David wastes no time in familiarising them with his unique style of management. Meanwhile, Tim seems to be taking his promotion very seriously.

name: Appraisals
overview: As David conducts the annual staff appraisals he discovers that the group from Swindon are less than impressed with their new boss and a lunchtime trip to the pub does little to improve the situation. The same cannot be said for Tim however, who is getting on particularly well with new girl Rachel.

name: Party
overview: A colleague's birthday provides a welcome distraction for the employees of Wernham Hogg and leads to a series of practical jokes at the expense of David and Gareth. Meanwhile, David's growing frustrations with new boss Neil constantly looking over his shoulder are somewhat alleviated by the arrival of two representatives from a public speaking company who seem keen to recruit him.

name: Motivation
overview: David's preparations for his first motivational training seminar that evening don't get off to the perfect start when he first discovers the staff's new nicknames for him that are doing the rounds and then receives another reprimand from Neil for neglecting his duties. Meanwhile, Tim and Rachel finally go public with their relationship, much to the dismay of Gareth.

name: Charity
overview: It's Comic Relief Day and the staff of Werhnam Hogg all do their bit to raise money including Dawn, whose 'kisses for 1' stand finally provides Tim with the opportunity he's been waiting for. But when David can only produce a draft of his new gameshow concept in place of an important company report, Neil and Jennifer draw the line and inform him that he is being made redundant.

name: Interview
overview: Although slightly peeved that the staff seem to be taking his redundancy in their stride, David's spirits remain high as he plans his future while also being interviewed for an article in 'Inside Paper'. Tim takes drastic action when he learns that Dawn has resigned in order to move to the USA with boyfriend Lee. However, when David is told that his services as a motivational speaker are also no longer required he sinks to his lowest ebb and begs Neil to reconsider the dismissal. But is it too late?

name: Webisodes: The Accountants
overview: Oscar, Angela and Kevin try to find $3000 missing from the office budget.

name: Webisodes: Kevin's Bank Loan
overview: Kevin pursues a unique solution in an effort to pay back his looming gambling debts. Before embarking on his plan, he also asks Oscar if a number of other ideas are legal, and Oscar is exasperated after having to tell Kevin that all of these ideas are completely illegal.

name: Webisodes: The Outburst
overview: Oscar has an outburst in the middle of the office and his coworkers start an investigation.

name: Webisodes: Blackmail
overview: Creed decides to take up blackmail, and attempts to get money out of Oscar, Andy, Kelly, Angela, and Meredith.

name: Webisodes: Subtle Sexuality
overview: Kelly and Erin form their own girl group, Subtle Sexuality, and get Ryan and Andy to assist them with their first music video, "Male Prima Donna".

name: Webisodes: The Mentor
overview: Erin wants to make a career change and finds herself a mentor, Angela.

name: The Pod Caster
overview: What happens when the employees at Dunder-Mifflin get creative at work? Find out in this exclusive itunes episode.

name: Threat Level Midnight: The Movie
overview: After 11 years of filming, editing, re-shooting, and re-editing, Michael Scott finally screened his action magnum opus, “Threat Level Midnight”. The short film stars Michael as Agent Michael Scarn, Dwight as Scarn’s sidekick Samuel L. Chang and Jim as painted evil-doer “Goldenface.” It’s “Goldfinger” meets “Youngblood” meets “The Maltese Falcon,” with a twist of “Thriller.”

name: Recap Special
overview: Before you dive into season 7, get caught up on everything that’s been going on at the office with this hilarious recap episode.

name: Webisodes: The 3rd Floor
overview: When Ryan decides his next great endeavor is a scary slasher movie, Kelly Kapoor, Erin, Kevin, Meredith, Creed, and Gabe all pitch in.

name: Webisodes: The Podcast
overview: Gabe creates a podcast

name: Webisodes: The Girl Next Door
overview: The latest smash single from Subtle Sexuality.

overview: This special one-hour retrospective features interviews with writers, producers and actors from the award-winning series. There are also some favorite moments from the series and a behind-the-scenes look at the finale.
