name: Offred
overview: Offred, one the few fertile women known as Handmaids in the oppressive Republic of Gilead, struggles to survive as a reproductive surrogate for a powerful Commander and his resentful wife.

name: Birth Day
overview: Offred and her fellow Handmaids assist with the delivery of Janine’s baby, prompting Offred to recall her own daughter’s birth. Offred draws closer to Ofglen while dreading a secret meeting with the Commander.

name: Late
overview: Offred visits Janine’s baby with Serena Joy and remembers the early days of the revolution before Gilead. Ofglen faces a difficult challenge.

name: Nolite Te Bastardes Carborundorum
overview: Punished by Serena Joy, Offred begins to unravel and reflects on her time with Moira at the Red Center. A complication during the Ceremony threatens Offred’s survival with the Commander and Serena Joy.

name: Faithful
overview: Serena Joy makes Offred a surprising proposition. Offred remembers the unconventional beginnings of her relationship with her husband.

name: A Woman's Place
overview: A Mexican Ambassador visiting Gilead questions Offred about her life as a Handmaid. Serena Joy reflects on her marriage and the role she once played in Gilead’s inception.

name: The Other Side
overview: Remembering her family’s treacherous escape attempt, a shocking revelation from life before Gilead provides a new perspective on Offred’s life.

name: Jezebels
overview: The Commander surprises Offred with a secret adventure in Gilead. Nick’s troubled past leads to his recruitment by the Sons of Jacob.

name: The Bridge
overview: Offred embarks on a dangerous mission for the resistance. Janine moves to a new posting. Serena Joy suspects the Commander’s infidelity.

name: Night
overview: Serena Joy confronts Offred and the Commander. Offred struggles with a complicated, life-changing revelation. The Handmaids face a brutal decision.

name: June
overview: Offred reckons with the consequences of a dangerous decision while haunted by memories from her past and the violent beginnings of Gilead.

name: Unwomen
overview: Offred adjusts to a new way of life. The arrival of an unexpected person disrupts the Colonies. A family is torn apart by the rise of Gilead.

name: Baggage
overview: Offred reflects on her relationship with her mother as she navigates her way through Gilead. In Little America, Moira tries to cope with the trauma she endured.

name: Other Women
overview: A baby shower provokes a troubling shift in Offred’s relationship with Serena Joy. Offred reckons with the choice she made that led her to become a Handmaid.

name: Seeds
overview: Offred spirals as a Gilead ceremony disrupts her relationship with Nick. Janine tries to adjust to life in the Colonies, jeopardizing her friendship with Emily.

name: First Blood
overview: Offred finds unexpected allies and obstacles in her search for a way to protect Hannah. The Commander prepares for the dedication of a new Red Center. Nick struggles with his new assignment.

name: After
overview: An attack sends shockwaves through both Gilead and Little America. Serena Joy makes a dangerous choice in order to protect her family. Moira searches for someone from her past.

name: Women's Work
overview: A sick baby tests Offred and Serena. Janine finally faces Naomi.

name: Smart Power
overview: The Waterfords embark on a diplomatic trip abroad.  Serena faces the temptation of life outside Gilead.  Luke and Moira grapple with survivor's guilt.  Offred seeks support from allies.

name: The Last Ceremony
overview: A frustrated Serena becomes desperate. The Commander tries to make amends with Offred. Nick pushes Eden farther away. Offred is faced with an unexpected reunion.

name: Holly
overview: Offred faces a grueling challenge alone as she recalls her life as a mother. Serena Joy and the Commander deal with the fallout of their actions towards Offred.

name: Postpartum
overview: Offred is sent to a familiar place. Nick is rocked by Gilead’s brutal response to a crime. Emily is assigned to a mysterious new house.

name: The Word
overview: Serena and the other Wives strive to make change. Emily learns more about her new Commander. Offred faces a difficult decision.

name: Night
overview: June embarks on a bold mission with unexpected consequences. Emily and Nichole make a harrowing journey. The Waterfords reckon with Serena Joy’s choice to send Nichole away.

name: Mary and Martha
overview: June helps Marthas with a dangerous task while navigating a relationship with her pious and untrustworthy new walking partner. Emily and Luke struggle with their altered circumstances.

name: Useful
overview: June navigates a meeting where she must face both Commander Waterford and Nick. Serena Joy attempts to recuperate at her mother’s home. Lawrence teaches June a hard lesson about the difficult decisions he makes as a Commander.

name: God Bless the Child
overview: June negotiates a truce in the Waterfords’ fractured relationship. Janine oversteps with the Putnam family, and a still-healing Aunt Lydia offers a brutal public punishment.

name: Unknown Caller
overview: June and Serena grapple with a new revelation about Nichole, leading to an incident that will have far-reaching ramifications.

name: Household
overview: June accompanies the Waterfords to Washington D.C., where a powerful family offers a glimpse of the future of Gilead. June makes an important connection as she attempts to protect Nichole.

name: Under His Eye
overview: June escalates her risky efforts to find Hannah. Emily must face her past crimes as the ongoing international diplomatic crisis becomes more complicated. Serena and Fred contemplate their future in Washington.

name: Unfit
overview: June and the rest of the Handmaids shun ofMatthew, and both are pushed to their limit at the hands of Aunt Lydia. Aunt Lydia reflects on her life and relationships before the rise of Gilead.

name: Heroic
overview: Confined in a hospital, June’s sanity begins to fray. An encounter with Serena Joy forces June to reassess her recent actions.

name: Witness
overview: Ready to strike back at her oppressors, June starts making arrangements for an ambitious plan, but a devious ploy on the part of Commander Waterford threatens to derail her.

name: Liars
overview: A return to Jezebel's puts everything in jeopardy. Serena Joy and Commander Waterford take a clandestine trip.

name: Sacrifice
overview: Gilead leadership is rocked by losses among their own. Luke and Moira adjust to new arrivals in Canada. June worries about disruptions to her plan, only to have tragedy strike the entire household.

name: Mayday
overview: With her plan in place, June reaches the point of no return on her bold strike against Gilead and must decide how far she’s willing to go. Serena Joy and Commander Waterford attempt to find their way forward in their new lives.

name: Pigs
overview: On the run, an injured June and the fugitive Handmaids find refuge at a farm, where the 14-year-old Wife nurses June back to health. June restores her role as the women’s leader. In Gilead, an imprisoned Lawrence tries to avoid a death sentence, and Aunt Lydia reels from the loss of 86 children on Angels’ Flight. The combative Waterfords, in custody in Toronto, learn of June’s feat.

name: Nightshade
overview: June plots revenge at the local Jezebels, before she and the Handmaids plan to leave the farm for the next safe house. In Toronto, Moira deals with the fallout of June’s choices, and Serena and Fred are bound together by a miracle.

name: The Crossing
overview: Captured by Gilead, June faces a vengeful Aunt Lydia and endures a torturous interrogation. Nick and Lawrence collaborate to protect June. In Toronto, Luke struggles with how to help June and Hannah.

name: Milk
overview: June takes a harrowing journey with Janine, trying to escape Gilead, as Janine remembers a stressful experience in her past. In Toronto, Serena tries to manipulate Rita, who seeks advice from Moira.

name: Chicago
overview: June seeks out more active rebels in the Chicago war zone, while Janine tries to help her fit in with their new group of survivors. Moira goes on her first field aid mission.

name: Vows
overview: After a shocking reunion with a dear friend, June contemplates the possibility of freedom, and confronts the unfulfilled promises she’s made to herself and to Luke.

name: Home
overview: June struggles with her newfound freedom, reuniting with loved ones and confronting her nemesis, Serena.

name: Testimony
overview: June confronts Fred and Serena in court and challenges Emily to face a painful reminder of her Gilead past. Lawrence presents Aunt Lydia with a newly captured, familiar handmaid.

name: Progress
overview: June and Luke work together to save Hannah, reaching out to Lawrence and Nick for help. Serena and Fred greet unexpected visitors from Gilead. Janine tries to assist Aunt Lydia when a Handmaid-in-training goes on a hunger strike at the Red Center.

name: The Wilderness
overview: June draws on all her resources and relationships, risking everything to ensure her own kind of justice.

name: Morning
overview: June confronts the consequences of killing Fred. A scared Serena makes an unexpected decision.

name: Ballet
overview: June struggles to move on with her life in Toronto. Serena plans an elaborate memorial. Aunt Lydia and Janine prepare Esther for her first posting as a Handmaid.

name: Border
overview: June and Moira join a rebel outpost. As a pregnant widow, Serena tries to restore her status. Aunt Lydia questions her strict methods of dealing with Handmaids.

name: Dear Offred
overview: June fights her need for violent revenge as Serena settles into her new role in Toronto. Rattled by Janine, Aunt Lydia makes a surprising suggestion to Lawrence.

name: Fairytale
overview: June and Luke embark on a dangerous quest. Serena gets to know her new hosts.

name: Together
overview: June and Luke’s mission puts them in serious jeopardy. Serena senses a threat from her benefactors. Lawrence and Nick make a shocking power move.

name: No Man’s Land
overview: June and Serena find themselves in a desperate situation.

name: Motherland
overview: June considers a tempting but risky offer from a surprise visitor. Serena hits rock bottom and searches for allies.

name: Allegiance
overview: June and Luke prepare for a rescue mission. Serena tries new tactics with her oppressive hosts. Lawrence makes a surprising proposal to elevate his status.

name: Safe
overview: Under threat, June must find a way to keep herself and her family safe from Gilead and its violent supporters in Toronto.

name: Train
overview: June and Serena find themselves thrown together on a dangerous journey as refugees fleeing an increasingly hostile Toronto. Moira faces a life-changing choice that could alter the resistance forever.

name: Exile
overview: June embarks on a challenging journey as she attempts to forge a new life in an unfamiliar community, while Serena seeks a sanctuary.

name: Devotion
overview: June struggles to save her loved ones. Meanwhile, Commander Lawrence welcomes diplomats to New Bethlehem, and Aunt Lydia searches for Janine.

name: Promotion
overview: June makes a shocking move that threatens to derail the rebellion's careful planning. Meanwhile, Commander Lawrence's influence grows as he climbs higher within Gilead's power structure.

name: Janine
overview: June and Moira undertake a perilous undercover mission that tests their courage and resourcefulness. At the same time, both Serena and Nick face critical crossroads, making decisions that could have lasting consequences for everyone involved.

name: Surprise
overview: When danger forces June to hide in the most unexpected of places, she must face new challenges that test her survival skills and judgment. One false move could change everything.

name: Shattered
overview: In this emotional episode, June's world is turned upside down by a stunning discovery, pushing her to the brink as she grapples with its devastating implications.

name: Exodus
overview: June and Moira put everything on the line as they execute their dangerous plan, knowing there's no turning back. Meanwhile, Serena faces a pivotal moment as she makes a decision that will change her life forever.

name: Execution
overview: As Gilead unleashes its full power against the resistance, June faces her greatest test yet. She walks a fine line between survival and rebellion, while the authorities tighten their grip with ruthless efficiency.

name: The Handmaid's Tale
overview: June faces the ultimate reckoning with her past in Gilead. She must make a choice: embrace the peace she's found or continue her fight against the regime that took everything from her. Her decision will ripple through the lives of everyone she holds dear.

name: Long Day's Journey Into Night
overview: The Matthews’ family road trip takes a horrifying turn when they are detoured to a small pastoral town from which they cannot leave. When their family RV crashes, Sheriff Boyd Stevens and other residents rush to save them before the sun goes down.

name: The Way Things Are Now
overview: At Colony House, Tabitha and Julie grapple with their new nightmarish reality. Out in the forest, Jim, Boyd and Kristi struggle to treat Ethan's injuries. Tragedy strikes from an unexpected source as a new threat arises in the town.

name: Choosing Day
overview: The Matthews family must choose which of the two settlements they will join. Meanwhile, Jade comes to terms with his situation and Boyd is faced with an impossible decision that strikes at the very heart of life in the town.

name: A Rock and a Farway
overview: Julie finds comfort in her new friends as Jim and Tabitha deal with their struggling marriage. Ethan ventures off into the forest with Victor while Father Khatri urges Boyd to embrace his role as leader. Sara receives another horrifying directive.

name: Silhouettes
overview: Jim, Tabitha, and Ethan begin asking questions about where they are in the hopes it may lead them home. Ellis and Fatima show Julie the lighter side of life in town. Jade struggles to make sense of their situation as Boyd seeks guidance.

name: Book 74
overview: Boyd's plan to head off into the forest provokes an unexpected response from Kenny; Jade enlists Jim's help with an experiment; Tabitha makes a chilling discovery that sends her down a unique path searching for answers.

name: All Good Things
overview: Father Khatri tells Boyd why he believes Sara may be useful; Jim and Tabitha find comfort in each other; Colony House celebrates the one-year anniversary of Fatima's arrival with a party that goes terribly wrong.

name: Broken Windows, Open Doors
overview: In the wake of another death, Boyd questions his decision to leave. Kenny steps up and embraces his new role. Jim rallies the town around his idea to build a radio tower. Fatima urges Ellis to make amends with his father before it’s too late.

name: Into the Woods
overview: Boyd and Sara journey deeper into the forest than Boyd has ever gone, encountering new and terrifying mysteries. Jim’s confidence in the radio tower begins to wane. An unexpected tragedy causes Donna to unravel. Kenny and Kristi share a moment.

name: Oh, the Places We'll Go
overview: Boyd draws strength from an unlikely source. Jim’s radio tower yields consequences which rock him to his very core. The hole that Tabitha has been digging leads her somewhere – and to someone - she could never have expected. Everything is about to change.

name: Strangers in a Strange Land
overview: In Sheriff Boyd's absence, Donna and Kenny struggle to manage the chaos as a busload of unwitting newcomers arrives in town; Victor and Tabitha go on a chilling journey through the nightmarish labyrinth of tunnels beneath the town.

name: The Kindness of Strangers
overview: A tense night in the diner as the residents and newcomers wait for sunrise; fear permeates the wreckage beneath the Matthews house, as Jim and Tom struggle to keep a panicked bus passenger quiet.

name: Tether
overview: Kenny and Ellis make a grisly discovery out in the forest; Boyd struggles with the reality of what's happening to him.

name: This Way Gone
overview: As Boyd's condition grows more alarming, Sara's return to town puts him in a difficult position; Jim shares a troubling new theory about the town.

name: Lullaby
overview: Sara must face the music, as word of her return spreads through town; Victor and Jade strike an unlikely bargain.

name: Pas de Deux
overview: Tensions run high at Colony House when word of the coming food shortage leaks out; a night at the clinic takes a terrifying turn.

name: Belly of the Beast
overview: Boyd and Kristi seek to capitalize on the apparent death of the Nightmare Creature; Jim finds an unlikely ally in the volatile Randall.

name: Forest for the Trees
overview: In their pursuit of the truth about the town, Jim and Randall hatch a dangerous plan; meanwhile, a new form of terror is brewing.

name: Ball of Magic Fire
overview: Panic spreads through town as the residents face a chilling new threat to their survival; Jim realizes the magnitude of the mistake he made by enlisting Randall in his cause.

name: Once Upon a Time…
overview: Boyd fears he may have finally run out of answers, as the residents of town prepare for the end; Tabitha clings to the belief that the children could be the key to their salvation.

name: Shatter
overview: Boyd feels the town slipping away from him as the weather grows colder and the residents more desperate.

name: When We Go
overview: Boyd struggles to find a path forward as the town says farewell to one of their own; Fatima's health takes a turn for the worse; Tabitha finds help from an unlikely ally.

name: Mouse Trap
overview: Kenny leads a group into the forest in search of food; Donna and Ellis try to talk Boyd out of a dangerous plan; Tabitha makes a mind-bending discovery; Fatima questions the welfare of her unborn baby.

name: There and Back Again
overview: Boyd is forced to make a tough decision when newcomers arrive in town at nightfall; Victor unearths memories from the past in the hopes of finding answers.

name: The Light of Day
overview: Victor must face a painful reminder of his past; Julie looks for ways to cope with her trauma; Boyd struggles to keep the town safe as the residents begin to question his judgement; Tabitha tries to adjust to her new surroundings.

name: Scar Tissue
overview: Fatima and Ellis make a big decision about her pregnancy; Boyd fears for the future of his family; Tensions rise in the Matthews house; Randall opens up to Marielle about his fears.

name: These Fragile Lives
overview: The edges begin to fray as concerns about Fatima's pregnancy deepen; Jade follows a clue trail into the forest; Julie and Randall seek a bit of normalcy.

name: Thresholds
overview: Accusations start flying and truths come to light in the aftermath of a tragedy; Victor struggles to recover long-buried memories about the town's past; Julie and Ethan search for answers about the mysterious ruins in the woods.

name: Revelations: Chapter One
overview: Tensions are at an all time high as the residents of town learn that one of their own has gone missing.

name: Revelations: Chapter Two
overview: Boyd is pushed to his limit as time begins to run out for someone he loves; Randall is haunted by his trauma and Victor reveals a hard truth; Tabitha's unlikely journey takes a shocking turn.

name: The Arrival
overview: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

name: Fray
overview: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

name: Merrily We Go
overview: Boyd tries to save Acosta from herself as Julie digs deeper into her newfound abilities; Tabitha embarks on a desperate gamble and Victor joins Ethan in a quest for answers.

name: Of Myths and Monsters
overview: An ominous discovery puts Boyd and his trusted circle on high alert; Julie searches for a way to harness her newfound abilities and Sara is once again tortured by the voices in her head.

name: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
overview: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

name: The Heart Is a Lonely Hunter
overview: Boyd and Jade find themselves at odds over whether or not they can trust the knowledge in Jade's head; deeply troubling news from the settlement makes its way back to town.

name: If a Tree Falls in the Forest…
Wake Up With The Schitt's: Spilling the Beans on the Good News
overview:
Mayor Roland and his wife Jocelyn spill the beans on the good news, 'Wake Up With The Schitt's' is now three minutes instead of just one. Roland tells a gripping story about hogs while the couple debates the popularity of Jocelyn's "famous" Gouda Balls recipe.

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: Win a Call from the Mayor
overview:
Roland and Jocelyn introduce a brand new segment: Win A Call From The Mayor. They pick a Schitt's Creek resident's name randomly and the lucky constituent gets a call from the Mayor himself! Not to spoil anything, but things get candid! Also, Jocelyn complains about loud birds.

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: With Special Guest Stevie Budd
overview:
Roland and Jocelyn welcome a very special guest, the enigmatic front desk vixen at the motel, Stevie Budd. Roland asks her the question we've all wanted to ask: just what makes Stevie Budd tick? And did someone say, "makeover"?

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: Cheese Sculptures
overview:
Jocelyn gives viewers a first hand account of last weekend's exciting Crafts Fair where she won first prize for her cheese sculpture, "Cheddar Squirrel Right Before Dawn." She then shows the audience just how easy it is to sculpt cheese with a live demonstration not to be missed!

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: Swap Shop
overview:
The Mayor and his wife introduce a thrilling new segment on the show called "Swap Shop," which lets viewers call in for a chance to swap one specific item for another specific item. You'll never guess who calls in!

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: Holiday Dish
overview:
Jocelyn prepares her delicious but simple holiday dish: Ancho-Rubbed Turkey Tetrazzini with a side of Mashed Potato Folly. Roland is her sous chef but gets a little handsy with the mayonnaise, if you know what we mean!

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: With Special Guest Twyla Sands
overview:
Jocelyn is still on cloud nine after the glorious opening gala for her new gardening book. Roland tells a harrowing story about a near death experience, which can be found in HIS new book, Roland Schitt's Past Life Experiences. They welcome special guest and head waitress at Cafe Tropical, Twyla, who justifiably shows off her impressive doll collection.

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Wake Up With The Schitt's: With Special Guest Alexis Rose
overview:
Roland and Jocelyn reveal the bad news: Wake Up With the Schitt's has been cancelled and will be replaced by a live traffic feed of Main Street. But the two try to make the best of what looks to be their final episode.

A "Funny or Die" Exclusive Webisode.

name: Merry Christmas, Johnny Rose
overview: It's Christmas Eve and Johnny wants to celebrate with an old-fashioned Rose Christmas Party, but the rest of the family has trouble getting into the holiday spirit.

name: Best Wishes, Warmest Regards: A Schitt’s Creek Farewell
overview: After six celebrated seasons and enough awards and nominations to make Moira Rose swoon, "Schitt’s Creek" comes to an end with the ultimate farewell for fans: an intimate behind-the-scenes look celebrating the beloved series and its undeniable cultural impact. Fans will go behind the scenes for the first time, with never-before-seen footage of wardrobe fittings, the emotional final table read, audition tapes, and more. The special will feature interviews with the cast, creators, journalists, and celebrity superfans including Paula Abdul, Will Arnett, Carol Burnett, Cameron Crowe, Tony Hale, Amy Sedaris, Johnny Weir, and more.

name: Schitt's Creek feat. Mariah Carey | Dear Class Of 2020
overview: Dear Class of 2020 is a virtual commencement celebration bringing together inspirational leaders and artists to celebrate graduates, their families, and their communities.

name: Schitt’s Creek Cast Q&A w/ Jennifer Garner
overview: The cast of “Schitts Creek” sits down for a live, unfiltered Q&A with Jennifer Garner to discuss the final season of the iconic comedy series.

name: Inside Schitt's Creek: Welcome to Town
overview: Welcome to Schitt's Creek. If you're not familiar with the town, this tourism video highlights the best they have to offer. Please visit.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Jocelyn’s House Tour
overview: Post dinner party, Jocelyn gives us a tour of her personal oasis, the Schitt house, showing off some of her most prized possessions.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Suggestion Box
overview: David creates a “suggestion box" for Stevie with some ideas on how to improve the motel.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Mom’s Wigs
overview: David and Alexis were never allowed near Moira's wigs growing up, but living in Schitt's Creek has brought everything closer... physically.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Café Tour
overview: You hungry? Twyla takes us through a tour of Café Tropical’s ambitious menu.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Vet Talk
overview: Ted Mullens, Schitt’s Creek’s very own doctor to the dogs recaps some of the town’s more interesting pet mishaps.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Social Media Guide
overview: What's it like to lose all of your Instagram followers? To read about your demise via Twitter? Alexis and David share their revised feelings on social media.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Community Service
overview: We asked Mutt why he sold drugs and what he thinks of his new partner, Alexis Rose. He didn't have a lot to say.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Worst Motel Ever
overview: Sean and Bree have finally left the motel, so David and Stevie reflect with us on their visit.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Birds and the Bees
overview: David and Alexis go down memory lane on a less than erotic trip through their past sexual experiences.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Oh Schitt!
overview: Some behind the scenes fun from our documentation of the Roses in Schitt's Creek.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Surprise Party
overview: Jocelyn and David tell us what went into preparing Moira's surprise party and David tries to guess which 17 ingredients were in the punch.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Goodbye
overview: It's goodbye and good riddance Schitt’s Creek for David and Alexis. Some townsfolk share their memories of their time with the Rose family...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Amish David
overview: After being stranded on a farm for what feels like forever, David obviously knows everything about Amish culture and momentarily considers converting...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Alexis’ Breakup Advice
overview: When you've dated everyone from a bear - trapper to a South American drug lord, you're bound to know the best way to get rid of the guy whose air of mystery has been lost…

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Bob’s Garage
overview: Welcome to Bob's Garage. Come on inside and let him show you where the magic happens... and no, we're not talking about that kind of magic. We're talking about the magic of fixing

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Gift
overview: When you're born with a personal driver, a yacht, and a private plane, the word bicycle isn't even in your vocabulary. But it is the worst gift you could ever give Alexis...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Customer Service
overview: David might have gotten hired at the Blouse Barn, but complimenting customers and answering the phone is a skill he hasn't quite mastered...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Ray’s House Tour
overview: Have you ever caught yourself wondering how a realtor/photographer/travel agent lives? Haven't we all? Well, you're in luck 'cause Ray Butani gave us a glimpse of the good life.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Picking Up
overview: Who's got better game, David or Stevie? The friends with (sometimes) benefits share their favourite pick up lines.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Ted’s Honeymoon
overview: Couples massages, tandem bicycling, tango lessons... all romantic things you are sure to enjoy on your honeymoon... well, unless your fiancé leaves you before the wedding...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Working Women
overview: Alexis got a job. Obviously, she's now the reigning expert on women in the workforce. And she wants to turn the vet clinic into a nightclub...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Parenting Advice
overview: Hypothetically speaking, if David and Stevie were to have kids, how big of a disaster would it be? And most importantly, what would they name them?

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Apology Sausages
overview: Some people apologize with roses, some say it with diamonds - but not the Schitts. Instead, Jocelyn says she's sorry... with sausages.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Getting Legal
overview: Who can tell the better lie? David and Alexis battle it out to see who's a worse person.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Mutt’s New Girl
overview: Alexis may have broken his heart, but Mutt's romantic side is still in one piece. And he even wrote a poem for his new girl, Tennessee.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Fad Diets
overview: Atkins, Paleo, Tae Bo, the Bowflex... we've heard all about the biggest diets and fitness fads. But what about the ones we haven't heard of?

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Threeway
overview: Who's more adventurous when it comes to sex? David and Stevie talk it out and talk dirty.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Workplace Etiquette
overview: What's appropriate workplace etiquette when working with your ex fiancée? Ted and Alexis write the rules but obviously don't follow any of them.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Motel For Sale
overview: When Stevie very, very briefly thought of selling the motel, she looked into quotes, found a realtor, took some exterior photos, and even brainstormed a few infomercials...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Jazzagals
overview: Have you always wondered how Jocelyn came up with the name for The Jazzagals? Has the mystery kept you awake at night? Well the time has come...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Party Planning
overview: What does it take to throw the dopest murder mystery party that's ever gone down in the history of Schitt's Creek? Alexis Rose knows, obvi.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Back to School
overview: Alexis is back in high school and convinced that everyone sees her less as a student and more as a sexy TA. Jocelyn disagrees.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Sex Talk
overview: Who's more adventurous when it comes to sex, David or Stevie? The exes get up close and personal.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Jocelyn’s Musical
overview: Picture 'Hamilton', but totally different. Here's the sneak peek of Jocelyn's off-off-off-off Broadway musical you didn't know you needed in your life.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Crew
overview: There are SO many things to see and do in Schitt's Creek... except nothing actually right in the town, you'll likely have to venture a little bit outside...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Teacher’s Review
overview: What happens when you combine Jocelyn's boundless energy with a lice outbreak and a sex ed class? We're not exactly sure, but we'd love to find out.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Alexis the Author
overview: Could you ever picture Alexis Rose as a famous and reclusive best-selling author that lives in a log cabin in the woods? Us neither. But she can!

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Dream Jobs
overview: Now that Alexis has graduated high school, what's her dream job? Who knows! But Ted's dreaming of hitting the devil sticking circuit... which is apparently a thing...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Best Way to Die
overview: When a man dies at the motel, David and Stevie get dark and twisty thinking about the best and worst ways to die.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Nacho Chip Casserole
overview: This is not your ordinary casserole. Jocelyn gives us more info on that nacho chip casserole she craves so much...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: So High School
overview: Twyla and Alexis obviously had wildly different high school experiences... but just how different you might ask?

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Dating with Alexis
overview: When a date for Alexis consists of anything from a quick trip to the south of France to a day at the spa under the northern lights in Iceland, it's hard for her to offer advice...

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Mommy Blog
overview: Jocelyn tries her hand at giving advice to new moms on her very first vlog. If you've never thought of using old jeans as a diaper, you're not alone.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Improv
overview: When you take a handful of improv classes and think you’re an acting coach. Twyla teaches Jocelyn the ropes. Yes, and...?

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Breakups
overview: Some people handle breakups better than others... and then there's Stevie. She shows Patrick how to dump someone that you haven't even been on a date with. She's that good.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Mr. and Mrs. Rose
overview: If David and Stevie were forced to get married... well, let's just say they have wildly different ideas of what that would look like.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Romcom
overview: The one where David tries to recreate scenes from his favourite romantic comedies and fails miserably.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Puppy PSA
overview: Alexis wants to include a pet adoption drive as part of Schitt's Creek Singles' Week. Could you give a home to one of these puppies?

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Alexis’ Awesome Icebreakers
overview: With Singles' Week coming up, Alexis has been hard at work, even making a document to break the ice. Mutt answers the questionnaire.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: Meet the Puppies
overview: The demand for dogs was so high after their successful puppy PSA, so Alexis and Ted get up close and personal with a few furry friends.

name: Inside Schitt’s Creek: The Holidays
overview: Growing up, the Roses celebrated the holidays a little bit unconventionally. David and Patrick compare traditions.

name: Behind the Episode Part 1 Dead Guy in Room 4
overview: Season 3 ended on such a high note, it was important to ground things. Go behind the episode with Dan Levy and Annie Murphy to find out more about the start of Season 4

name: Behind the Episode Part 2 Pregnancy Test
overview: While Alexis is growing into a stronger person, Stevie is the same old Stevie. Go behind the latest episode of 'Schitt's Creek' with Dan Levy and Annie Murphy.

name: Behind the Episode Part 3 Asbestos Fest
overview: Asbestos Fest, the annual event in Schitt's Creek to raise funds to rid the town of asbestos, caused quite the stir on the latest episode. Find out more with Dan Levy, Annie Murphy and Noah Reid.

name: Behind the Episode Part 4 Girls' Night
overview: Dan Levy says it was "a real special episode of Schitt's Creek." Find out why...

name: Behind the Episode Part 6 Open Mic
overview: "This song means quite a bit to me, so don't f*ck this up."

name: Behind the Episode Part 7 The Barbecue
overview: Not everything can be perfect in Schitt's Creek, and something was bound to go wrong between David and Patrick...

name: Behind the Episode Part 8 The Jazzaguy
overview: Eugene Levy may be way more musical thank you think

name: Behind the Episode Part 9 The Olive Branch
overview: Dan Levy's not sure he'll ever be able to watch this scene from 'The Olive Branch', but he'll happily talk about it for you...

name: Behind the Episode Part 10 Baby Sprinkle
overview: Who's for a game of Sleepy Mommy?

name: Behind the Episode Part 11 The Rollout
overview: Quite the revelatory episode of Schitt's Creek for Alexis and Ted. Check out more behind the making of the episode... and find out who was sitting behind the camera, sobbing.

name: Behind the Scenes Part 12 Singles Week
overview: It's the beginning of so many new chapters, and the end of so many old ones.

name: Behind the Scenes Part 13 The Crowening
overview: Dan Levy, Noah Reid and Annie Murphy sit down to talk about the making of Season 5's premiere, 'The Crowening'.

name: Our Cup Runneth Over
overview: After losing their fortune, the Rose family must relocate to their last remaining asset – a small town Johnny once bought as a joke.

name: The Drip
overview: Johnny must get permission to sell the town from its Mayor, Roland Schitt. David and Alexis spend a night out with the locals.

name: Don't Worry, It's His Sister
overview: Johnny tries to get a potentially offensive town sign taken down, while David is faced with the frightening task of finding a job.

name: Bad Parents
overview: Johnny and Moira, feeling like they have failed as parents, try to get to know their grown children. Alexis spies on Mutt and thinks he's having an affair with the Mayor's wife.

name: The Cabin
overview: Looking for privacy, Johnny and Moira take the Mayor up on his offer of using his cabin for a night, while Alexis and David use the opportunity to throw a party.

name: Wine and Roses
overview: Moira is hired to be a local winery's spokesperson;  David struggles with a health problem.

name: Turkey Shoot
overview: Following an incident where David is unable to kill an insect in his room, Stevie, as a joke, invites David along on Roland's annual turkey shoot.

name: Allez Vous
overview: Moira and David try to earn money by selling cosmetics to the locals, while Johnny heads to Elmdale in hopes of collecting unemployment insurance.

name: Carl's Funeral
overview: Johnny reluctantly agrees to speak at the funeral of a local man he doesn’t really know. Alexis struggles with her new boyfriend’s love of animals.

name: Honeymoon
overview: Johnny and Moira go to Roland's Hawaiian party; Alexis and Ted host a dinner party; David and Stevie's relationship heats up.

name: Little Sister
overview: Moira's estranged sister, Deedee, pays an unexpected visit, while David agrees to talk with one of Jocelyn's students about being "different".

name: Surprise Party
overview: Johnny tries to arrange a surprise birthday party for Moira. Things backfire when Moira, unwittingly, takes over the planning of her own party.

name: Town for Sale
overview: Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town, while David and Alexis discover they may have become more attached to Schitt’s Creek than they ever thought possible.

name: Finding David
overview: The Roses search for their missing son, David, while Alexis takes her relationship with Mutt to the next level despite technically being engaged to Ted.

name: Family Dinner
overview: Moira decides to cook dinner with the help of David. Johnny scopes out an office for his consulting business. And Alexis finally comes clean with Ted about their engagement.

name: Jazzagals
overview: Moira attempts to join the town’s a cappella group. Alexis enjoys the heady first days of her latest relationship. And Johnny helps out at Bob’s Garage despite himself.

name: Estate Sale
overview: Johnny and Moira go to an estate sale. Mutt surprises Alexis with a bike, while Roland asks David to help him shop for a special item.

name: Bob's Bagels
overview: Johnny convinces himself to have a partnership with Bob.  David has an interview at a clothing store. Moira takes care of Alexis.

name: Moira vs. Town Council
overview: Moira tries to beautify the town. David misuses the company credit card. A grooming misstep forces Alexis and Mutt to question their relationship.

name: The Candidate
overview: Johnny considers running for town council. David and Stevie look for love. Alexis copes with being single.

name: Milk Money
overview: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business. Moira tries to connect with the townspeople. David gives style advice.

name: Moira's Nudes
overview: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

name: Ronnie's Party
overview: Johnny and Moira, on the campaign trail, meet with a key demographic. Alexis struggles in her new job. David offers awkward emotional support to his boss’ 14-year-old daughter.

name: The Motel Guest
overview: Johnny and Moira have a surprise guest, David and Alexis look for an apartment.

name: Lawn Signs
overview: Some of Moira's lawn signs are missing, David and Alexis try to get David's boss out of trouble.

name: Happy Anniversary
overview: Johnny and Moira go out for their anniversary and run into a couple they knew from their former life, while Alexis and David attend Mutt’s annual barn party, making up with some friends, and making out with others.

name: Opening Night
overview: Johnny struggles to find a new purpose, while Moira must confront the harsh realities of local politics.

name: The Throuple
overview: David and Stevie must come to terms with their new relationship, while Alexis and Moira become anxious when they schedule a rare mother/daughter lunch.

name: New Car
overview: Johnny and Moira try to get a deal on a used car while David helps Stevie put her great aunt to rest.

name: Driving Test
overview: Johnny and Moira worry about the future of the motel and David panics at the thought of retaking his driving test.

name: Rooms by the Hour
overview: Johnny puts the motel in jeopardy when he rents rooms to a dubious enterprise and David helps Moira with a film audition.

name: Murder Mystery
overview: Johnny and Stevie pitch a nearby golf course on a package deal with the motel. Moira tries to get out of an invitation to Twyla’s murder mystery party.

name: General Store
overview: David plans a new business venture, while Alexis adjusts to her first day at school.

name: Motel Review
overview: David meets a new friend while setting up his business, Johnny defends Alexis’s schoolwork, and Moira deals with a difficult guest at the motel.

name: The Affair
overview: Moira and Roland find themselves in a compromising situation. Alexis drives a wedge between David and Patrick.

name: Sebastien Raine
overview: David's ex comes to town to do a photoshoot for Moira; Johnny and Roland think Bob is cheating at poker.

name: Stop Saying Lice!
overview: Johnny tries to stop the spread of lice. Moira tries to get out of having a garden named after her.

name: Friends and Family
overview: Johnny and Moira struggle to find a place for their family portrait. David hosts a 'soft launch' of his new store.

name: Grad Night
overview: Johnny and Stevie celebrate having a fully booked hotel; David and Patrick go on a date.

name: Dead Guy in Room 4
overview: While Moira fears she is responsible for the death of a motel guest, David and Patrick decide to make their budding romance official.

name: Pregnancy Test
overview: Johnny prepares himself after finding a positive pregnancy test; David and Patrick search for privacy.

name: Asbestos Fest
overview: Moira prepares for her headline debut at the Asbestos Fest; David deals with some loitering teens in the apothecary.

name: Girls' Night
overview: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

name: R.I.P. Moira Rose
overview: A rumor appears on line that Moira died; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

name: Open Mic
overview: David and Patrick throw an open mic to promote their shop; David gets nervous when Patrick states he will be performing. Johnny and Alexis rebrand the motel, but Stevie fears they are overexpanding. Moira tries to keep secret the gender of the Schitts' new baby.

name: The Barbecue
overview: David and Moira hold a party for Patrick, but David worries about how his family would adversely affect Patrick. Alexis investigates with help a mysterious text from Ted.

name: The Jazzaguy
overview: After the barbecue fiasco, Stevie takes David to a spa for some consoling, but she bought a honeymoon package making things worse. Johnny impresses the Jazzagals with his talents, but Moira doesn't like his joining the group. Alexis tries out a dating app and dates a cute local.

name: The Olive Branch
overview: David tries to reconcile with Patrick. Moira pitches a singles event at Town Hall while Johnny buys Stevie a gift for her help at the motel.

name: Baby Sprinkle
overview: For research, Johnny and Moira attend a singles event but get too involved. Alexis runs into an old friend, David agrees to help Jocelyn in planning her baby shower.

name: The Rollout
overview: Moira tries to avoid jury duty and David issues a recall on a Rose Apothecary product that causes rashes.

name: Singles Week
overview: As Singles Week gets underway, Jocelyn has her baby. Patrick takes his relationship with David to the next level.

name: The Crowening
overview: While Moira is in Bosnia filming the Crows movie that she hopes will revive her acting career, David attempts to take his relationship with Patrick to new heights.

name: Love Letters
overview: A sleep-deprived Moira worries about a stack of old love letters addressed to Johnny from another woman, while David and Stevie are held up at David's store.

name: The Plant
overview: Alexis and Johnny hatch a plan to impress a motel reviewer, while David and Patrick search for a new apartment.

name: The Dress
overview: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure with the arrival of Moira’s high-priced red carpet gown for the Crows movie premiere. David is conned into taking a road trip with Stevie.

name: Housewarming
overview: David and Patrick throw a housewarming party and Ted finally lets loose, while Johnny and Moira try their best to babysit Roland Jr. for the evening.

name: Rock On!
overview: Moira and the Jazzagals take Jocelyn out for a night at the casino, while Johnny tries to navigate an awkward conversation with Stevie about intimacy in the workplace.

name: A Whisper of Desire
overview: Johnny suspects that Ted’s mom is attracted to him, while Moira can’t resist getting involved in a local musical production.

name: The Hospies
overview: Johnny and Stevie attend the regional hospitality awards, while Moira does everything in her power to stop Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret.

name: The M.V.P.
overview: David agrees to sub in for the annual baseball game, and Moira runs a rehearsal that pushes Stevie over the edge.

name: Roadkill
overview: Johnny and Moira's afternoon plans are interrupted when they accidentally hit a cat. David runs into an old colleague at the flea market whose new business bears a striking resemblance to Rose Apothecary.

name: Meet the Parents
overview: While in town for the surprise party, Patrick's parents get a surprise of their own. Moira gets coaxed into going to a soap opera convention with Alexis.

name: The Roast
overview: Johnny fills in for Moira at the annual Mayor’s Roast, as David distracts Moira from finding out that Stevie and Patrick have been taking private dance lessons.

name: The Hike
overview: Patrick and David go on a romantic hike. Everyone panics over Johnny's health scare.

name: Life Is a Cabaret
overview: It’s opening night for Cabaret, and Stevie is nowhere to be found. David tries to make a big announcement, but keeps getting overshadowed by the musical.

name: Smoke Signals
overview: On their way to drop off Alexis at the airport, David stops to scout a potential wedding venue and holds things up. After a week in the closet, Moira finally emerges, and with a sudden newfound lease on life, she convinces Johnny to join her for a romantic picnic by the creek.

name: The Incident
overview: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, and when Patrick is so understanding, it only makes David spiral further. Johnny, Stevie, and Roland attend a viewing for a motel nearby, but it quickly becomes clear there was a mistake. Alexis helps Moira join social media, and while at first resistant, once she gets the hang of it, Moira can’t seem to get enough.

name: The Job Interview
overview: After Johnny is rejected for a bank loan, he and Moira resolve to pursue Bob as an investor for the new motel. Meanwhile, Alexis and Ted struggle with long-distance, and it’s proving to be especially difficult to find time to chat on their anniversary. David helps Stevie with a job interview for a local airline.

name: Maid of Honour
overview: After Moira shares the newly released "Crows" movie trailer with the Jazzagals, she can’t help but notice Jocelyn’s lack of praise. Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel and organize a stakeout to get to the bottom of it. David chooses his maid of honour.

name: The Premiere
overview: Alexis plans a local premiere for the "Crows" movie, and everyone in town wants to make an appearance on the red carpet. David tends to Patrick who has gotten his wisdom teeth removed, and Patrick announces some unexpected ideas in his slightly-sedated state. After her short-lived stint with Larry Air, Stevie makes a big career decision.

name: The Wingman
overview: The video from the "Crows" premiere goes viral, thrusting Moira back in the public eye and flooding Alexis with press. Meanwhile, Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world by taking him for a night out on the town. David and Patrick contemplate an offer from David’s old flame, Jake.

name: Moira Rosé
overview: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger’s vineyard and accidentally get a bit tipsy. Meanwhile, Johnny attempts to have "the talk" with Patrick, but it’s proving to be difficult when Patrick is so invested in a baseball game. Alexis brings Stevie, Twyla, Ronnie and Jocelyn to a bizarre fitness class.

name: The Presidential Suite
overview: Johnny and Moira treat themselves to a night in the Presidential Suite at the new motel, but soon discover other people had the same intention. Alexis is pleasantly surprised by a visitor but struggles with the news they’ve unloaded. David and Patrick ready themselves for their engagement photoshoot.

name: Rebound
overview: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis’s romantic life, making an already difficult time worse for her. After discovering her car covered in eggs, Moira learns she offended the townspeople by disparaging Schitt’s Creek in an interview with People magazine. Jocelyn helps out David and Patrick at the store and proves to be a top-notch salesperson, much to David’s annoyance.

name: Sunrise, Sunset
overview: Moira’s former "Sunrise Bay" producers show up with big news, while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap and discovers some dirt. Alexis gives Moira advice on how to proceed, leaving Moira feeling conflicted. Meanwhile, the new motel is proving to be a money pit for Johnny, which has him worried about paying for David’s lavish catering bill for the wedding.

name: The Bachelor Party
overview: The Roses attend the Escape Room portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

name: The Pitch
overview: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, while the family anxiously awaits their return.

name: Start Spreading the News
overview: Moira receives some unexpected news, and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

name: Happy Ending
overview: When David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, the family scrambles to make it right.

name: Get Your Nonna a Necklace
overview: Tasked with buying a sentimental gift for their dying grandmother, bickering siblings Nicky and Morgan commit a minor crime with major consequences.

name: I Will Do ANYTHING To Survive
overview: A dangerous ultimatum from Yusuf forces Morgan and Nicky to run interference at an already chaotic family funeral.

name: Show Me The Money
overview: Nicky and Morgan's success is short-lived when they're coerced into a "friendship" with Yusuf's boss. Linda reconsiders her run for mayor.

name: Weakness Always Exposes Itself
overview: Nicky and Tareq share their feelings, while Morgan and Max get personal at couple's therapy. A surprise guest adds extra spice to a family dinner.

name: James 4:17
overview: When a job at a cattle auction goes sideways, Nicky must leverage his job to prove his worth. Linda's campaign gets a boost from a political scandal.

name: You F-ck With My Family, You F-ck With Me
overview: A fed-up Nicky tries to cut ties with Ivan — and his sister — as he prepares to come clean about Tareq. Morgan attends an uncomfortable baby shower.

name: I've Really Enjoyed My Time With You
overview: Anxious to impress an important partner, Ivan splashes out on a trip to Miami. Nicky and Morgan connect on a new level after a stimulating dinner.

name: Rock, Paper, Scissors
overview: Morgan and Nicky brace for blowback from the Miami operation as their family, friends and some unwelcome faces converge around the election results.

name: An American Coach in London
overview: This is first time we are introduced to the Ted Lasso character, created for a series of promotions of NBC landing the Premier League broadcasting rights for the US.

name: Behind-the-Scenes with Coach Ted Lasso
overview: You've seen the NBC Sports advert with Coach Lasso as a manager in the making. Spurs TV spoke to Hollywood star Jason Sudeikis when he was shooting the advert at the Tottenham Hotspur Training Centre.

name: The Return of Coach Lasso
overview: After being fired by Tottenham, Ted helps in the broadcast booth.

name: A Conversation with José Mourinho
overview: Ted Lasso might not know much about British football, but he does know José Mourinho’s phone number somehow.

name: SAG Awards: Ted Lasso Team on the Greatest Ensembles of All Time
overview: Tonight at the 27th Annual SAG Awards, some solid thoughts from the Ted Lasso team on the greatest ensembles of all time.

name: The Lasso Way
overview: The cast talks about what made the first season great, just ahead of the season 2 premiere.

name: The Missing Christmas Mustache
overview: Ted and the crew search for a lost item that ultimately leads him to realize the meaning of the holiday season.

name: Richmond Till We Die
overview: A six-minute and 38-second video featuring a look back at the series with Jason Sudeikis, Brendan Hunt, Hannah Waddingham, Brett Goldstein, Juno Temple, and all your favorite Richmond stars.

name: An Inside Look: Season 3 - Rebuilding Richmond
overview: The stakes are higher than ever as Ted and AFC Richmond look to build more than a winning team this season.

name: Pilot
overview: American football coach Ted Lasso is hired by a wealthy divorcée to coach the English soccer team AFC Richmond.

name: Biscuits
overview: It’s Ted’s first day of coaching, and fans aren’t happy. He makes little headway but remains undeterred as the team plays its first match.

name: Trent Crimm: The Independent
overview: To arrange an in-depth exposé, Rebecca pairs cynical journalist Trent Crimm with Ted for a day. Ted and Roy venture into the community.

name: For the Children
overview: Rebecca hosts the team’s annual charity benefit, where Ted stages a reconciliation between Roy and Jamie.

name: Tan Lines
overview: With his wife and son visiting from America, Ted makes drastic changes to the lineup during a critical match.

name: Two Aces
overview: When Jamie refuses to train, Ted turns to talented new signing Dani Rojas—and the team is struck by an age-old curse.

name: Make Rebecca Great Again
overview: Rebecca celebrates her first anniversary as a divorcée as the team plays a match in Liverpool.

name: The Diamond Dogs
overview: Ted and Roy are both having relationship problems. Ted consults the Diamond Dogs. Roy lays it on the line with Keeley.

name: All Apologies
overview: After a series of mistakes on the pitch, pressure mounts to bench Roy. Rebecca finally reveals the truth to Ted.

name: The Hope That Kills You
overview: Richmond plays a climactic match that will determine the fates of Ted and his club.

name: Goodbye Earl
overview: AFC Richmond brings in a sports psychologist to help the team overcome their unprecedented seven game tie-streak.

name: Lavender
overview: Ted is surprised by the reappearance of a familiar face. Roy tries out a new gig.

name: Do the Right-est Thing
overview: Rebecca has a special visitor shadow her at work. A player’s return is not welcomed by the team.

name: Carol of the Bells
overview: It’s Christmas in Richmond. Rebecca enlists Ted for a secret mission, Roy and Keeley search for a miracle, and the Higginses open up their home.

name: Rainbow
overview: Nate learns how to be assertive from Keeley and Rebecca. Ted asks Roy for a favor.

name: The Signal
overview: Ted is fired up that the new team dynamic seems to be working. But will they have a chance in the semifinal?

name: Headspace
overview: With things turning around for Richmond, it’s time for everyone to work on their issues—like Ted’s discomfort, Nate’s confidence, and Roy’s attention.

name: Man City
overview: Ted and Dr. Sharon realize they might have to meet each other halfway. Tensions are high as the team prepares for the semifinal.

name: Beard After Hours
overview: After the semifinal, Beard sets out on an all-night odyssey through London in an effort to collect his thoughts.

name: No Weddings and a Funeral
overview: Rebecca is stunned by a sudden loss. The team rallies to show their support, but Ted finds himself grappling with a piece of his past.

name: Midnight Train to Royston
overview: A billionaire football enthusiast from Ghana makes Sam an unbelievable offer. Ted plans something special for Dr. Sharon’s last day with the team.

name: Inverting the Pyramid of Success
overview: Richmond gets their final chance to win promotion as Ted deals with the fallout of Trent Crimm’s painfully honest exposé.

name: Smells Like Mean Spirit
overview: The newly promoted AFC Richmond face mockery as pundits predict they’ll finish dead last this season.

name: (I Don’t Want to Go to) Chelsea
overview: News of a top player looking to move to London sends the English clubs into a frenzy. Richmond play their first game back in the Premier League.
Richmond adjust to an exciting change, but Jamie has reservations. Ted learns there's something new going on back in Kansas as well.

name: Big Week
overview: Everyone's feeling the pressure as Richmond gear up to play West Ham. Ted is reunited with an old friend.

name: Signs
overview: With their season in a tailspin, Richmond try to right the ship against mighty Manchester City. Off the pitch, everyone faces their own setbacks.

name: Sunflowers
overview: A friendly match takes the team to Amsterdam, where one night out unlocks truths for many.

name: The Strings That Bind Us
overview: The Greyhounds try a new strategy that has everyone thinking outside the box. Sam prepares to host a VIP guest at Ola's.

name: We’ll Never Have Paris
overview: While watching Henry, Ted fights the urge to spiral when Michelle and Dr. Jacob go on a romantic trip. An online leak has massive implications for Keeley.

name: La Locker Room Aux Folles
overview: Colin and Isaac's friendship is tested. Roy is asked to do a press conference.

name: International Break
overview: While some of the Greyhounds head home to play for their countries in international matches, Edwin Akufo brings a business proposal to Rebecca.

name: Mom City
overview: An unexpected guest has Ted on edge. When Richmond travel to Manchester for a big match, Roy and Keeley become concerned about Jamie.

name: So Long, Farewell
overview: AFC Richmond play their final match of the season.

name: Unpacking Episode 1
overview: The Ratliff Family: overwhelmed with perfect imperfections.

name: Unpacking Episode 2
overview: The White Lotus staff are both polite and persistent.

name: Unpacking Episode 3
overview: Opposites attract at #TheWhiteLotus.

name: Unpacking Episode 4
overview: Pursue the life you want—whether you’re a guest or staff.

name: Unpacking Episode 5
overview: Cheers to confronting complicated friendship dynamics.

overview: Jennifer Coolidge & Haley Lu Richardson discuss their characters Tanya and Portia’s motivations in the season 2 premiere — and answer our Vacay Q&A.

name: Unpacking Season 2 Episode 2
overview: Aubrey Plaza & Will Sharpe discuss their characters Harper and Ethan’s motivations in the second episode of season 2 — and answer our Vacay Q&A.

name: Unpacking Season 2 Episode 3
overview: Michael Imperioli & F. Murray Abraham discuss their characters Dominic and Bert’s motivations in the third episode of season 2 — and answer our Vacay Q&A.

name: Unpacking Season 2 Episode 4
overview: Leo Woodall & Adam DiMarco discuss their characters Jack and Albie’s motivations in the fourth episode of season 2 — and answer our Vacay Q&A.

name: Unpacking Season 2 Episode 5
overview: Theo James & Meghann Fahy discuss their characters Cameron and Daphne’s motivations in the fifth episode of season 2 — and answer our Vacay Q&A.

name: Unpacking Season 2 Episode 6
overview: Beatrice Grannó & Sabrina Impacciatore discuss their characters Lucia and Valentina’s motivations in the sixth episode of season 2 — and answer our Vacay Q&A.
