name: The Heirs of the Dragon
overview: Viserys hosts a tournament to celebrate the birth of his second child. Rhaenyra welcomes her uncle, Daemon, back to the Red Keep.

name: The Rogue Prince
overview: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council. Viserys is urged to secure the succession through marriage. Daemon announces his intentions.

name: Second of His Name
overview: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder. The realm celebrates Aegon’s second nameday. Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage.

name: King of the Narrow Sea
overview: After Rhaenyra cuts short her tour of Westeros, Daemon introduces the princess to the Street of Silk after dark.

name: We Light the Way
overview: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale. Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons. Alicent seeks the truth about the princess.

name: The Princess and the Queen
overview: Ten years later. Rhaenyra navigates Alicent’s continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena weigh an offer in Pentos.

name: Driftmark
overview: As the families gather on Driftmark for a funeral, Viserys calls for an end to infighting and Alicent demands justice.

name: The Lord of the Tides
overview: Six years later. With the Driftmark succession suddenly critical, Rhaenyra attempts to strike a bargain with Rhaenys.

name: The Green Council
overview: While Alicent enlists Cole and Aemond to track down Aegon, Otto gathers the great houses of Westeros to affirm their allegiance.

name: The Black Queen
overview: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries to hold the realm together, and Daemon prepares for war.

name: A Son for a Son
overview: While Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her son’s murder, in King’s Landing, Alicent grows concerned that Aegon’s Small Council may lead them to an all-out war. Larys suggests Aegon needs a new Hand, and Rhaenyra arrives at a fateful decision.

name: Rhaenyra the Cruel
overview: As Otto schemes to turn the public against her, Rhaenyra questions Daemon’s loyalty. Meanwhile, Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge.

name: The Burning Mill
overview: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme. Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks.

name: The Red Dragon and the Gold
overview: In Rhaenyra’s absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In King’s Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegon’s fragile hold on authority.

name: Regent
overview: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegon’s Council, Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal, and Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee.

name: Smallfolk
overview: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyze the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemon’s unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council.

name: The Red Sowing
overview: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon pressures a young liege lord to raise up his bannermen.

name: The Queen Who Ever Was
overview: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape, and Alicent grows more concerned about Helaena’s safety. Flush with new power, Rhaenyra looks to press her advantage.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 1
overview: For episode 1, “Countdown,” creators David Benioff, D.B. Weiss, and Alexander Woo discuss ensuring the historical accuracy of the Cultural Revolution, introducing the Oxford 5, and establishing the mystery that will slowly unfold throughout the season.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 2
overview: For episode 2, “Red Coast,” Cast member Zine Tseng (Ye Wenjie) examines her character’s decision to reply to the message from space, while Alex Sharp (Will Downing) and John Bradley (Jack Rooney) explain the solemnity of Will’s medical diagnosis.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 3
overview: For episode 3, “Destroyer of Worlds,” 3 Body Problem series creators Benioff, Weiss, and Woo discuss developing the show’s VR headset and the Sophon persona, a shocking character death, and collaborating with Oscar-winning director Andrew Stanton on the VR world.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 4
overview: For episode 4, “Our Lord,” 3 Body Problem creators and Jonathan Pryce (Mike Evans) discuss fairytales and the concept of lying. Director Minkie Spiro talks about the big Ye Wenjie reveal of the episode and why Spiro filmed it the way she did, while Rosalind Chao (Ye Wenjie) comments on the intentions behind Ye’s fateful decision.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 5
overview: For episode 5, “Judgment Day,” 3 Body Problem creators and Benedict Wong (Da Shi) weigh the sacrifices the show’s protagonists have made up to this point. Director Minkie Spiro and actor Liam Cunningham (Thomas Wade) discuss the creation of the epic Judgment Day scene, and its tragic aftermath.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 6
overview: For episode 6, “The Stars Our Destination,” Jess Hong (Jin Cheng) and Liam Cunningham (Thomas Wade) evaluate Jin's brilliant tactical plan, the first step in Earth’s defense strategy, while Eiza González (Auggie Salazar) questions the moral implications. Alex Sharp (Will Downing) gives more insight into his character, and the relationship between Jin and Will. Rosalind Chao (Ye Wenjie) shares her feelings about Ye’s true motivations.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 7
overview: For episode 7, “Only Advance,” Jess Hong analyzes the nature of Jin’s relationship with Raj (Saamer Usmani) versus Will (Alex Sharp), who makes the ultimate romantic confession on his deathbed. Rosalind Chao (Ye Wenjie) teases Ye’s intentions with the “Einstein in Heaven” joke she tells Saul (Jovan Adepo) and reflects on her character's tasteful off-screen demise.

name: Inside the Episodes - Episode 8
overview: For episode 8, “Wallfacer,” Jovan Adepo (Saul Durand) predicts how Saul will handle what’s been given to him. The 3 Body Problem series creators and director Jeremy Podeswa dissect the emotionally suspenseful rocket launch scene, and what it could mean for the story going forward.

name: Countdown
overview: Unsettling events put a group of brilliant friends on edge as a mystery unravels with origins tracing back to China during the Cultural Revolution.

name: Red Coast
overview: Auggie's countdown jeopardizes her nanotech work. Jin becomes engrossed in an otherworldly VR game. Ye Wenjie follows through on a radical idea.

name: Destroyer of Worlds
overview: Obsessed with their virtual reality quest, Jin and Jack race to solve a complex riddle — but advancing to the next level brings harrowing consequences.

name: Our Lord
overview: Jin seeks justice after a death rattles the group. Investigators learn of an extremist group devoted to an otherworldly entity ahead of a major summit.

name: Judgment Day
overview: As threat levels rise, a secret mission to retrieve enemy intel ventures into dangerous territory. An ominous message reaches Earth.

name: The Stars Our Destination
overview: With the world in a state of panic following a momentous declaration, Wade gathers the world’s greatest minds to prepare a defense plan.

name: Only Advance
overview: A bold proposition for the Staircase Project puts the group at odds. Will weighs his options. Ye returns to a familiar place.

name: Wallfacer
overview: A high-level operation upends Saul's life. With emotions and expectations high, the probe launches into space as humanity enters a daunting new era.

name: Series 1 recap
overview: Get ready for series two with this handy recap of the first series.

name: The Story So Far (Series 3)
overview: All you need to know ahead of series 3 of the epic gangster drama set in the lawless streets of 1920s Birmingham. Starring Cillian Murphy and Tom Hardy.

name: The Story So Far (Series 4)
overview: The biggest moments of Tommy's story.

name: The Making of Peaky Blinders Season 2
Return to Watery Lane
overview: Introduction to Series 4 by the writer/Producer Steven Knight, aired on BBC FIRST

name: The Peaky Blinder World
overview: Go behind the scenes with the cast and crew of Series 4 of Peaky Blinders

name: The Shoot Out
overview: Go behind the scenes of the thrilling shootout between Tommy and Luca in episode 5.

name: The Rise Of Tommy Shelby
overview: Ahead of Peaky Blinders Series 5, actor Cillian Murphy discusses the rise of lead character Tommy Shelby, who has evolved from war hero, to gangster, to MP.

name: The Ballad Of The Peaky Blinders
overview: Get reacquainted with key moments from Series 1-4, through an epic, lyrical recap performed by Birmingham spoken word artist Casey Bailey.

name: Bonus Scene: Finn calls a meeting
overview: From Episode 1: Finn is concerned about the Irish tinkers camped nearby. He reminds them that he's a Shelby.

name: Bonus Scene: Tommy wants information
overview: From Episode 2: Tommy shows Polly the remains of the land mines. He wants Polly to find the truth.

name: Bonus Scene: Aberama shows Polly his land
overview: From Episode 3: Aberama tells Polly of the plans he had, and suggests plans he may have.

name: Bonus scene: Polly and the Swan
overview: From Episode 5: Polly takes a message from Mosley to the dancer who played the swan, and reflects with Aberama on Tommy’s current activities.

name: Bonus Scene: Arthur & Charlie
overview: From Episode 5: On the boat back from their mission in London, Charlie makes a suggestion to Arthur.

name: Bonus Scene: Tommy and Polly
overview: From Episode 5: Matters come to a head when Polly questions Tommy’s recent behavior and suggests that soon she may resign.

name: Bonus Scene: Pollys Gypsy Thing
overview: From Episode 6: Michael and Gina reveal their plan. Polly warns them of the possibilities they have to consider.

name: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

name: Episode 1
overview: Birmingham, 1919. Thomas Shelby controls the Peaky Blinders, one of the city's most feared criminal organisations, but his ambitions go beyond running the streets. When a crate of guns goes missing, Thomas recognises an opportunity to move up in the world.

name: Episode 2
overview: Thomas fixes a horserace, provoking the ire of local kingpin Billy Kimber. He also starts a war with gypsy family the Lees. Meanwhile, Inspector Campbell carries out a vicious raid of Small Heath in search of the stolen guns.

name: Episode 3
overview: Thomas Shelby plans to go to Cheltenham races in order to get closer to Billy Kimber. Knowing the gangster's appetite for beautiful women, Thomas invites Grace to accompany him. Meanwhile some IRA sympathisers approach Thomas with an offer to buy the stolen guns.

name: Episode 4
overview: Thomas Shelby's war with the Lee family of gypsies escalates, and Campbell puts further pressure on him to deliver the stolen guns. Meanwhile Thomas's brother John plans to marry a former prostitute, but Thomas suspects that she's still on the game.

name: Episode 5
overview: Thomas Shelby has to deal with an IRA chief who has come to Small Heath to avenge his cousin's death. Meanwhile Campbell gets closer to the stolen guns, and Grace has to decide whether her loyalties lie with him or with Thomas.

name: Episode 6
overview: As Thomas Shelby prepares to oust Billy Kimber, hidden secrets are revealed and the family have to face up to the problems that have divided them. Meanwhile, Campbell, obsessed with taking down the Peaky Blinders, unleashes one last plan to destroy them.

name: Episode 1
overview: As the 1920s begin to roar, business is booming for the Peaky Blinders gang. Tommy Shelby starts to expand his legal and illegal operations, with an eye on the racetracks of the south. Meanwhile, an enemy from Tommy's past returns to Birmingham.

name: Episode 2
overview: Tommy offers to help Polly by searching for her children, who long ago were taken from her. In London, Tommy risks his life by meeting enigmatic leader Alfie Solomons. Meanwhile Arthur continues to feel the devastating effects of the Great War.

name: Episode 3
overview: Tommy hatches a plan to take control of the southern racecourses. He also meets the aristocratic May Carleton, and sees an opportunity to move up in the world. Meanwhile both Major Campbell and London gangster Darby Sabini plan Tommy's downfall.

name: Episode 4
overview: Tommy finds out exactly what mission Major Campbell is forcing him to undertake. Arthur spearheads a ferocious takeover of London's Eden Club. Meanwhile, Polly's son Michael is welcomed into the business, and quickly experiences the dark side of the Peaky Blinders.

name: Episode 5
overview: Tommy is caught by surprise when his powerbase in London is obliterated. As Tommy struggles to save his family and regain the upper hand, May expresses her feelings for him, and he is paid a visit by an old friend.

name: Episode 6
overview: As derby day arrives, Tommy is faced with impossible decisions as he plans to strike back at his enemies and take the family business to another level. Meanwhile, Major Campbell has one final card to play - one that he is certain will bring about Tommy's demise.

name: Episode 1
overview: It is Thomas Shelby's long-awaited wedding day. In the middle of the celebrations, a mysterious visitor imperils the entire Shelby family, and Tommy finds himself pulled into a web of intrigue more lethal than anything he has yet encountered.

name: Episode 2
overview: Tommy discovers the extent of the mission given to him and the extreme lengths his new paymasters are willing to go to in their quest for power. Meanwhile his own family's activities lead to escalating danger in Birmingham.

name: Episode 3
overview: Tommy travels to Wales seeking absolution, and uncovers a traitor in the Economic League. Michael develops a taste for guns. Arthur gets good news.

name: Episode 4
overview: Tommy and Tatiana play a personal and dangerous game to acquire information from one another, and Tommy finally comprehends the magnitude of Tatiana's warped ideals. Meanwhile, Polly reveals a dark secret, with terrible consequences for Tommy.

name: Episode 5
overview: As the Russians test the Peaky Blinders, Tommy realises that he is being seriously outmanoeuvred. But he has an ace up his sleeve in the form of an enemy turned ally - if only he can control him.

name: Episode 6
overview: As Tommy prepares to commit the most audacious crime of his career, an unexpected blow forces him to face his worst fears in a race against time.

name: The Noose
overview: Tommy is estranged from his family and focused only on business. But when he receives a mysterious letter, he realises the Shelbys are in danger.

name: Heathens
overview:
As the Shelbys come to terms with the shocking events of Christmas Day, Tommy endeavours to unite his family. Until the current threat is dealt with, their only safe place is together in Small Heath. Johnny Dogs and Charlie set about arming the locals - everyone is now a Peaky bodyguard. Tommy enlists the help of tough Romany Gypsy Aberama Gold, who wants something unusual in return.

Jessie Eden confronts Tommy about the workers' pay. She warns him that revolution is in the air, and when Tommy doesn't relent she calls his bluff. As the situation plays out, Tommy's factory manager tells him he has one more meeting - with a mysterious businessman from Paris. But what transpires is no ordinary meeting with no ordinary businessman...

name: Blackbird
overview:
The Italians launch another attack on the Peaky Blinders. Tommy realises that the Shelbys need to evolve if they are to survive, but some of the family are reluctant to part with tradition.

As the strike takes hold at the Lanchester factory, Tommy pays a personal visit to Jessie Eden, but he is outmanoeuvred when she reveals something she knows about his past.

Changretta plots to continue the vendetta in the most devastating way possible. As well as identifying an enemy of the Shelby family who could help him, Luca makes direct contact with someone at the heart of the Peaky Blinders organisation.

name: Dangerous
overview:
The Peaky Blinders are lured by the Italians into a cat-and-mouse chase on the streets of Birmingham, where it becomes clear that Tommy has met his match. Trapped in Small Heath, Tommy tries to console himself with a visit from an old flame but it soon becomes clear that he can't always get what he wants.

As his factory lies idle, Tommy confronts the possibility that the Communists might win and he will be deemed a traitor to his class. Meanwhile, Changretta prepares to spring another trap.

name: The Duel
overview:
Tommy finds himself engaged in bloody battle with Luca Changretta and his gang. The family gather to find out what happened, but Lizzie has even greater news to break.

Meanwhile, an army colonel has questions for Ada about her past as a communist, and Jessie Eden confirms just how far she is prepared to go in pursuit of her cause. And sensing an opportunity to capitalise on his situation, Luca Changretta makes his way to London to present a plan to Alfie Solomons.

name: The Company
overview:
It is the night of the big fight - Bonnie Gold versus Goliath. But as the bell rings and the crowd goes wild, dangers lurk in the shadows for Tommy Shelby and his family.

When Changretta plays his final ace, he sets in motion a series of events that will change the Peaky Blinders forever.

name: Black Tuesday
overview: 1929 – While his family deals with the repercussions of the Wall Street Crash, Tommy Shelby MP faces new dangers from unexpected quarters.

name: Black Cats
overview: The Peaky Blinders come under fire when Tommy finds danger on his doorstep and a friend is brutally attacked.

name: Strategy
overview: The charismatic Mosley shows his hand. Tommy prepares to make a treacherous new alliance.

name: The Loop
overview: Tommy agrees to dangerous new partnerships when a golden opportunity presents itself. A Shelby party promises fireworks.

name: The Shock
overview: Tommy reveals his intentions for Mosley. Someone close to the Shelbys is targeted.

name: Mr Jones
overview: Family tensions surface after an unexpected announcement. Tommy puts his plan for Oswald Mosley into action, but has he underestimated his opponent?

name: Black Day
overview: The foiled assassination of Mosley costs the Shelbys a family member. Four years later, the imminent end of Prohibition brings Tommy to North America.

name: Black Shirt
overview: Back home, Tommy forges an alliance with the unlikeliest of people to sweeten his proposal to Jack Nelson. Daughter Ruby makes a troubling claim.

name: Gold
overview: Tommy races to find Esme. In his stead, Ada introduces Jack Nelson to Mosley and Diana. Arthur meets a recovered addict who understands his struggle.

name: Sapphire
overview: Devastated by another loss, Tommy sets out to get revenge. Fascism hits close to home for Ada. An urgent message arrives from the tuberculosis clinic.

name: The Road to Hell
overview: Tommy makes a deal with Linda. The mole lurking among the Shelbys is given a new mission. Diana agrees to do a favor for Tommy — on one condition.

name: Lock and Key
overview: The mole learns when and where Arthur will be alone. Fresh out of prison, Michael sets out on his mission. Finn's loyalty to the Shelbys is tested.

name: Sonnie's Edge
overview: In the underground world of "Beastie" fights, Sonnie is unbeatable - as long as she keeps her edge.

name: Three Robots
overview: Long after the fall of humanity, three robots embark on a sightseeing tour of a post-apocalyptic city.

name: The Witness
overview: After seeing a brutal murder, a woman flees from the killer through the streets of a surreal city.

name: Suits
overview: A community of farmers use their homemade mechs to defend their families from an alien invasion.

name: Sucker of Souls
overview: Unleashed by an archaeological dig, a bloodthirsty demon battles a team of mercenaries armed with... cats?

name: When the Yogurt Took Over
overview: After scientists accidentally breed super-intelligent yogurt, it soon hungers for world domination.

name: Beyond the Aquila Rift
overview: Awakening after traveling light years off course, a ship's crew struggles to discover just how far they've come.

name: Good Hunting
overview: The son of a spirit hunter forges a bond with a shape-shifting Huli jing.

name: The Dump
overview: Ugly Dave calls the garbage dump home, and he's not about to let some city slicker take it away from him.

name: Shape-Shifters
overview: Deep in Afghanistan, two Marines with supernatural powers face a threat from one of their own kind.

name: Helping Hand
overview: Stranded in orbit, an astronaut must choose between life and limb before her oxygen runs out.

name: Fish Night
overview: After their car breaks down in the desert, two salesmen take a dreamlike voyage to the dawn of time.

name: Lucky 13
overview: After the drop-ship Lucky 13 lost two crews, no pilot would fly her... but rookies don't get a choice.

name: Zima Blue
overview: The renowned artist Zima recounts his mysterious past and rise to fame before unveiling his final work.

name: Blindspot
overview: A gang of cyborg thieves stage a high-speed heist of a heavily armored convoy.

name: Ice Age
overview: A young couple moves into an apartment and finds a lost civilization inside their antique freezer.

name: Alternate Histories
overview: Want to see Hitler die in a variety of comically fantastic ways? Now you can. Welcome to Multiversity!

name: The Secret War
overview: Elite units of the Red Army fight an unholy evil deep in the ancient forests of Siberia.

name: Automated Customer Service
overview: If your home-cleaning unit is attempting to murder you, please press 3.

name: Ice
overview: Two brothers far from home join genetically 'modded' locals in a deadly race.

name: Pop Squad
overview: A cop charged with fighting the scourge of overpopulation is haunted by the human toll of his work.

name: Snow in the Desert
overview: Every bounty hunter in the galaxy wants a piece of Snow.

name: The Tall Grass
overview: During a journey across the prairie, a man becomes transfixed by distant, ghostly lights.

name: All Through the House
overview: On Christmas Eve, two kids tiptoe downstairs to catch a glimpse of Santa. A twisted tale for adults only.

name: Life Hutch
overview: After crash-landing on a craggy planet, a pilot makes his way to shelter, only to face a threat within.

name: The Drowned Giant
overview: The body of a colossal young man washes ashore and becomes an object of fascination for the locals.

name: Three Robots: Exit Strategies
overview: Three robots walk into the post-apocalypse… and take a whirlwind tour of humankind's last attempts to save itself.

name: Bad Travelling
overview: Release the Thanapod! A ship’s crew member sailing an alien ocean strikes a deal with a ravenous monster of the deep.

name: The Very Pulse of the Machine
overview: When an exploratory mission to a Jovian moon ends in disaster, the lone survivor must begin a perilous but mind-expanding journey.

name: Night of the Mini Dead
overview: A bit of unholy cemetery sex ends badly, kicking off a worldwide zombie plague. It’s the cutest apocalypse you’ll ever see.

name: Kill Team Kill
overview: US Special Forces are trained to neutralize any threat — even a cybernetic killing machine created by the CIA. Their secret weapon? A sense of humor.

name: Swarm
overview: Two human scientists study the secrets of an ancient alien entity — but soon learn the horrible price of survival in a hostile universe.

name: Mason's Rats
overview: Welcome to the Ratpocalypse! Farmer Mason knows he has a real pest problem when they start shooting back. Bloody hell!

name: In Vaulted Halls Entombed
overview: Modern warfare meets elder gods. A special forces squad on a hostage rescue mission finds themselves trapped in a prison containing an age-old evil.

name: Jibaro
overview: A deaf knight and a siren of myth become entwined in a deadly dance. A fatal attraction infused with blood, death and treasure.

name: Can't Stop
overview: Turn up your stereo and tune into a Red Hot Chili Peppers concert that's unlike any other — with a few strings attached.

name: Close Encounters of the Mini Kind
overview: They came in peace. But when their first encounter with Earthlings goes awry, these extra-tiny extraterrestrials are ready for vengeance.

name: Spider Rose
overview: At the edge of the galaxy, a grieving woman dreams of revenge. Can an adorable newcomer help her destroy her enemies — without destroying her humanity?

name: 400 Boys
overview: Are they gods? Are they giants? All this band of survivors knows is that they're deadly — and they'll have to set aside their own turf war to stop them.

name: The Other Large Thing
overview: This furry revolutionary has plans for world domination. All he needs is a henchman with opposable thumbs.

name: Golgotha
overview: A mysterious race of aquatic aliens has arrived on Earth. They don't want to be taken to our leaders.

name: The Screaming of the Tyrannosaur
overview: In an orbital arena, gladiators and dinosaurs compete in a deadly race — and face a terrifying new opponent.

name: How Zeke Got Religion
overview: On a perilous mission into hostile territory, the crew of a World War II bomber encounters an unholy enemy.

name: Smart Appliances, Stupid Owners
overview: From thermostats to toothbrushes to toilets, these ultra-modern appliances have something to say about their hapless owners.

name: For He Can Creep
overview: London, 1757. Satan battles a cat for the soul of a poet whose verse could give him dominion over the earth.

name: AKA Ladies' Night
overview: Jessica Jones is hired to find a pretty NYU student who's vanished, but it turns out to be more than a simple missing persons case.

name: AKA Crush Syndrome
overview: Jessica vows to prove Hope's innocence, even though it means tracking down a terrifying figure from her own past.

name: AKA It's Called Whiskey
overview: It won't be easy to acquire or deploy, but Jessica thinks she's found a weapon to use against Kilgrave. Luke and Jessica bond over their similarities.

name: AKA 99 Friends
overview: A new case demands attention as Jessica tries to find out who's spying on her for Kilgrave. Trish's radio show yields unexpected consequences.

name: AKA The Sandwich Saved Me
overview: Despite Jessica's objections, Trish's new friend Simpson gets involved in the hunt for Kilgrave. Jessica recalls a pivotal moment in her life.

name: AKA You're a Winner!
overview: Luke hires Jessica to help him find someone who may have skipped town, but she fears he'll learn too much about her history in the process.

name: AKA Top Shelf Perverts
overview: Malcom, Simpson and Trish go rogue to prevent Jessica from carrying out an extreme plan to outwit Kilgrave.

name: AKA WWJD?
overview: Jessica experiences a strange homecoming courtesy of Kilgrave. Hogarth's conflict with her estranged wife reaches a tipping point.

name: AKA Sin Bin
overview: Just when Jessica has Kilgrave right where she wants him, Hogarth's involvement complicates the situation. Details of Kilgrave's past emerge.

name: AKA 1,000 Cuts
overview: A discovery has the potential to change the entire game -- if Jessica can refuse Kilgrave's offer.

name: AKA I've Got the Blues
overview: Jessica searches morgues for clues. Trish goes all-out to keep Simpson from getting in Jessica's way. Malcom has an epiphany.

name: AKA Take a Bloody Number
overview: The hunt for Kilgrave reunites Jessica with Luke. Trish receives some unexpected information about Simpson and Jessica.

name: AKA Smile
overview: Jessica and Luke get help from someone else in the neighborhood. Kilgrave gears up for a major test of powers against Jessica.

name: AKA Start at the Beginning
overview: While Jessica deals with a rival PI and a paranoid would-be client, Trish digs up a medical file that could unlock the mystery of Jessica's powers.

name: AKA Freak Accident
overview: Jessica sets out to find Dr. Kozlov and makes a startling discovery. Trish recruits Malcolm for backup as she visits a figure from her past.

name: AKA Sole Survivor
overview: As her visions intensify, Jessica visits an abandoned clinic, where she stumbles on a new lead. Jeri faces an ultimatum after her secret gets out.

name: AKA God Help the Hobo
overview: Between anger management classes and tabloid scandals, Jessica and Trish track down a third patient linked to IGH. Oscar extends an olive branch.

name: AKA The Octopus
overview: Backed into a corner, Jessica's forced to share her intel on the killer. A groggy Trish tries to pull herself together before an important meeting.

name: AKA Facetime
overview: Jessica gate-crashes an exclusive country club on the hunt for the killer. Trish's new addiction begins to spiral out of control.

name: AKA I Want Your Cray Cray
overview: Flashbacks shed new light on the aftermath of the family's car accident and reveal a painful turning point in Jessica's adult life.

name: AKA Ain't We Got Fun
overview: While Jessica debates her next move, Malcolm confronts Trish about her erratic behavior. Jeri makes contact with a healer.

name: AKA Shark in the Bathtub, Monster in the Bed
overview: The shooting forces Jessica to rethink her plans. Oscar asks for help with a family crisis. Trish's frustrations finally boil over.

name: AKA Pork Chop
overview: Jeri finagles a deal for her new client in exchange for Karl's location. Trish forges ahead with her own investigation. A prison guard crosses a line.

name: AKA Three Lives and Counting
overview: Shocked by her own actions and haunted by visions of Kilgrave, Jessica worries she's turning into a monster. Trish's plans for Karl become clear.

name: AKA Pray for My Patsy
overview: As Jessica and Dorothy wait anxiously for updates on Trish, a call from Costa brings alarming news. Jeri hatches a plan to get her revenge.

name: AKA Playland
overview: Waking up in unfamiliar surroundings, Jessica once again finds herself torn between two worlds and facing an impossible choice.

name: AKA The Perfect Burger
overview: As Jessica focuses on helping the helpless, Dorothy Walker shows up at Alias to beg for help finding a missing Trish.

name: AKA You're Welcome
overview: Tensions run high between Jessica and Trish as Trish hones her new catlike skills and scours the city for a chance to be a hero.

name: AKA I Have No Spleen
overview: Itching to get back out on the streets and find her attacker, Jessica defies her doctor's advice. Jeri reconnects with her college flame Kith.

name: AKA Customer Service is Standing By
overview: Jessica learns there's more to Erik then meets the eye as they track down three potential attackers. Malcolm digs up dirt on Kith's husband.

name: AKA I Wish
overview: Teaming up with Trish to stake out Sallinger, Jessica makes a startling discovery. Jeri's plot to expose Peter yields unexpected consequences.

name: AKA Sorry Face
overview: As the police sift through the gruesome crime scene, Jessica and Trish race to find Sallinger's latest captive.

name: AKA The Double Half-Wappinger
overview: Jessica and Trish go on a road trip to dig into Sallinger's past and unearth a horrifying discovery.

name: AKA Camera Friendly
overview: When Sallinger posts a video teasing his next crime, Jessica responds with her own media play. Jeri demands that Malcolm identify the masked woman.

name: AKA I Did Something Today
overview: After a shocking blow, Jessica's forced to choose between protecting Trish and destroying Sallinger. Jeri seizes a chance to get back in Kith's life.

name: AKA Hero Pants
overview: Jessica wrestles with her emotions as she tries to untangle herself from a murder investigation.

name: AKA Hellcat
overview: Trish revisits her troubled childhood with Dorothy while plotting to stop Sallinger and stamp out evil across the city.

name: AKA A Lotta Worms
overview: As Trish makes a move on Sallinger, Jessica intervenes -- and ends up caught in a harrowing dance with the killer.

name: AKA Everything
overview: An old friend visits Jessica as she sets out on an agonizing mission and learns the true cost of being a hero.

name: Pilot
overview: Joe meets and falls in love with Beck and goes down a social-media rabbit hole to learn everything about her. While this may be a real shot at real love, there are some things standing in the way, such as her ex, Benji.

name: The Last Nice Guy in New York
overview: Beck and Joe have a real date. Joe does everything he can to win Beck over, but she's still stuck on Benji.

name: Maybe
overview: Beck isn't certain that Joe is 'The One', so he sets out to prove he's boyfriend material.

name: The Captain
overview: Beck heads out of town to rendezvous with the man she's been texting. Joe follows and is shocked by what he finds. Beck realizes she and Joe are going to have to bring a scary level of truth and authenticity to their connection.

name: Living with the Enemy
overview: Joe and Beck's fledgling relationship is tested by the increasingly intrusive meddling of Beck's friend. Joe does everything in his power to solve his problem without making a mess.

name: Amour Fou
overview: Joe's devotion to Beck takes him to a lavish but eerily remote summer home and a face-to-face encounter with an equally obsessed adversary who is just as intent on possessing her heart.

name: Everythingship
overview: Beck suffers a loss and Joe is right there with a shoulder to lean on. But he can't quite shake the worry and jealousy he still feels.

name: You Got Me, Babe
overview: Joe and Beck's lives have taken very different turns. A chance encounter brings every possibility to the surface and they must decide which way their want their story to go.

name: Candace
overview: Beck can't shake the feeling that there's more to the story of Joe's lost former love. Determined to find out the truth, it's Beck's turn to go to shocking lengths to dig up the truth on Joe.

name: Bluebeard's Castle
overview: Beck's deepest truths are revealed. Joe pushes the limits of what he'll do for love.

name: A Fresh Start
overview: Joe— now 'Will'—arrives in his own personal hell on Earth: LA. He's trying to go straight, but the past doesn’t always leave well enough alone.

name: Just the Tip
overview: Joe realizes Will Bettelheim isn’t all he’s cracked up to be. The fallout threatens to get in the way of his burgeoning connection with Love.

name: What Are Friends For?
overview: Joe attempts to keep things platonic with Love and keep his nose out of Ellie's business, but his instincts soon get the better of him.

name: The Good, the Bad & the Hendy
overview: As he tries to adapt to sharing Love with Forty, Joe is caught off guard by a group date—and his protectiveness of Ellie quickly escalates.

name: Have a Good Wellkend, Joe!
overview: Love brings Joe to a wellness weekend, where he gets a good look at her family's dynamic. Forty’s surprise guest has him feeling anything but zen.

name: Farewell, My Bunny
overview: Joe performs surveillance on a potential problem, but suspects someone might be tailing him, too. Painful memories put Love on edge about the present.

name: Ex-istential Crisis
overview: To soothe heartache, Joe turns to ancient remedies, modern technology and drinking with Delilah. One small slip-up could have major consequences.

name: Fear and Loathing in Beverly Hills
overview: Joe wants to get away, but Forty insists they finish their script. As pressure mounts, Forty’s excessive coping devices make for a harrowing night.

name: P.I. Joe
overview: As Love looks after an increasingly skittish Ellie, Joe tries to reconstruct the events of a trippy evening—but finds the truth to be elusive.

name: Love, Actually
overview: Joe has always been full of surprises, but Love has a few of her own. Is this the beginning of the end, or the end of the deceiving?

name: And They Lived Happily Ever After
overview: After a delivery room surprise, new dad Joe struggles to connect with his infant child, but he has no trouble at all fostering a new infatuation.

name: So I Married an Axe Murderer
overview: Joe and Love try couples therapy, but their issues may need more than counselling—and their friction isn't the only thing they need to make disappear.

name: Missing White Woman Syndrome
overview: Love grows apprehensive as media scrutiny intensifies next door. An acute sickness in the family drudges up old memories—and worse—for Joe.

name: Hands Across Madre Linda
overview: An impulsive retaliation by Love lands her and Joe in a bind. Though Joe seeks a different way out than usual, it proves to be a tall order.

name: Into the Woods
overview: Joe begrudgingly goes on a hunting trip with some other local husbands. Love tries to manage her burgeoning relationship with Theo.

name: W.O.M.B.
overview: As her mother launches a new venture, Love grows increasingly concerned about a potential big change herself. Joe has a breakthrough in self-awareness.

name: We're All Mad Here
overview: While Dottie spirals into emotional turmoil, Love tries to get intel on Matthew's investigation. Joe sets his sights on derailing Marienne's ex.

name: Swing and a Miss
overview: Joe selfishly tries to coerce Love into a lifestyle change, but things go south quickly. Theo discovers just how deep Matthew's obsession goes.

name: Red Flag

name: Alien: Earth Podcast Episode 1: Neverland
overview: When a spaceship crash-lands on Earth, a sister searches for her brother amidst an unexpected alien threat.  Host Adam Rogers breaks down episode 1 of FX’s Alien: Earth with series creator Noah Hawley, co-EP Migizi Pensoneau, and actor Sydney Chandler.  Join them as they discuss everything from immortality and trillionaires to Peter Pan and facehuggers in the dramatic opening to this new chapter of the Alien universe.

name: Alien: Earth Podcast Episode 2: Mr. October

Join Adam in discovering what it takes to bring the Xenomorph to life on set, how to bring a franchise all about space down to Earth, and what separates a human from a hybrid.

name: Alien: Earth Podcast Episode 3: Metamorphosis

Join them as they discuss the Xenomorph at the peak of its evolution, Boy K’s bare feet, and what makes a machine a machine.

Join them to dive deep into the elements of horror and love present in this episode, the making of a more disgusting monster, and the motivations behind two Lost Boys who are more lost than ever before.

Join Adam back where the Alien franchise started, in space, to pull back the curtain on Noah Hawley's original TV series version of an Alien movie.

name: Alien: Earth Podcast Episode 6: The Fly

Join Adam for the penultimate episode of the show to dive into the creation of the score, look back at how far our characters have come from episode 1, and wonder at the costs of scientific advancement.

name: Behind the Set
overview: We have a lot to talk about when it comes to Netflix’s Wednesday series! Not only the fact that Jenna Ortega absolutely slays her role as Wednesday Addams, while still getting to see the OG Addams Family Wednesday, Christina Ricci as Marilyn Thornhill. There are so many incredible things to consider when talking about the set of the show. For one thing, it was filmed in Romania, which is not often utilized in film and TV, but the essence of Bucharest really captures the vibe that Tim Burton and the rest of the team really wanted for the show. There are also tons of easter eggs that reference Tim Burton’s other films. Did you happen to notice anything on the back wall of the Weathervane Cafe? A lot of the set was built at Buftea Studios, the largest and longest film studio in Eastern Europe! They literally do everything from construction to post production. Pilgrim World, the sheriff’s house, the town of Jericho, and the quad were all built there!

The New World
overview: Joe Blake, a resistance fighter, leaves German New York with cargo for neutral Colorado. In Japanese San Francisco, Juliana Crane receives footage of the Allies winning the war and a bus ticket to Colorado from her sister. There, she meets Joe. Joe reveals a dark secret.

name: Revelations
overview: Joe is increasingly torn between duty and his growing feelings for Juliana. While Ed tries to stop Frank from making an irrevocable decision, Smith's investigation is interrupted when he has trouble with his witness. Tagomi's plan goes awry as events take a dramatic turn at the Crown Prince's speech.

name: The New Normal
overview: Juliana returns home, only to discover new clues that lead her closer to unraveling the mystery behind the films. Joe faces a tough debriefing upon his return home. Kido begins his investigation into the events surrounding the Crown Prince's speech. Tagomi and Wegener make a last-ditch attempt to complete their mission.

name: End of the World

name: Kindness
